    exact/linear_differentiable/continuous_lsubmx. Qed.

    Lemma
    bilinear_schwarz
    Source code
     (
    U
    Source code
    V'
    Source code
    W'
    Source code
     : normedModType R)
      (
    f
    Source code
     : {bilinear U -> V' -> W'}) : continuous (fun
    p
    Source code
     => f p.1 p.2) ->
      exists2
    k
    Source code
    , k > 0 & forall
    u
    Source code
    v
    Source code
    , `|f u v| <= k * `|u| * `|v|.
    Proof.
    move=> /(_ 0); rewrite /continuous_at linear0r => /(_ _ (nbhsx_ballx _ _ ltr01)).
    move=> /nbhs_ballP [_ /posnumP[e] he]; exists ((2 / e%:num) ^+2) => // u v.
    have [|un0] := real_le0P (normr_real u).
      by rewrite normr_le0 => /eqP->; rewrite linear0l !normr0 mulr0 mul0r.
    have [|vn0] := real_le0P (normr_real v).
      by rewrite normr_le0 => /eqP->; rewrite linear0r !normr0 mulr0.
    rewrite -[`|u|]/((PosNum un0)%:num) -[`|v|]/((PosNum vn0)%:num).
    set ku := 2 / e%:num * (PosNum un0)%:num.
    set kv := 2 / e%:num * (PosNum vn0)%:num.
    rewrite -[X in f X](@scalerKV _ _ ku) /ku // linearZl_LR normrZ.
    rewrite gtr0_norm // -ler_pdivlMl //.
    rewrite -[X in f _ X](@scalerKV _ _ kv) /kv // linearZr_LR normrZ.
    rewrite gtr0_norm // -ler_pdivlMl //.
    suff /he : ball 0 e%:num (ku^-1 *: u, kv^-1 *: v).
      rewrite -ball_normE /= distrC subr0 => /ltW /le_trans; apply.
      rewrite ler_pdivlMl 1?pmulr_lgt0// mulr1 ler_pdivlMl 1?pmulr_lgt0//.
      by rewrite mulrA [ku * _]mulrAC expr2.
    rewrite -ball_normE /= distrC subr0.
    have -> : (ku^-1 *: u, kv^-1 *: v) =
        (e%:num / 2) *: ((PosNum un0)%:num ^-1 *: u, (PosNum vn0)%:num ^-1 *: v).
      by rewrite invfM [kv ^-1]invfM invf_div -[_ *: u]scalerA -[_ *: v]scalerA.
    rewrite normrZ ger0_norm // -mulrA gtr_pMr // ltr_pdivrMl // mulr1.
    by rewrite prod_normE/= !normrZ !normfV !normr_id !mulVf ?gt_eqF// maxxx ltr1n.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    bilinear_eqo
    Source code
     (
    U
    Source code
    V'
    Source code
    W'
    Source code
     : normedModType R) (
    f
    Source code
     : {bilinear U -> V' -> W'}) :
      continuous (fun
    p
    Source code
     => f p.1 p.2) -> (fun
    p
    Source code
     => f p.1 p.2) =o_ (0 : U * V') id.
    Proof.
    move=> fc; have [_ /posnumP[k] fschwarz] := bilinear_schwarz fc.
    apply/eqoP=> _ /posnumP[e]; near=> x; rewrite (le_trans (fschwarz _ _))//.
    rewrite ler_pM ?pmulr_rge0 //; last by rewrite num_le_max /= lexx orbT.
    rewrite -ler_pdivlMl //.
    suff : `|x| <= k%:num ^-1 * e%:num.
      by apply: le_trans; rewrite num_le_max /= lexx.
    near: x; rewrite !near_simpl; apply/nbhs_le_nbhs_norm.
    by exists (k%:num ^-1 * e%:num) => //= ? /=; rewrite /= distrC subr0 => /ltW.
    Unshelve. all: by end_near. Qed.

    Fact
    dbilin
    Source code
     (
    U
    Source code
    V'
    Source code
    W'
    Source code
     : normedModType R) (
    f
    Source code
     : {bilinear U -> V' -> W'})
    p
    Source code
     :
      continuous (fun
    p
    Source code
     => f p.1 p.2) ->
      continuous (fun
    q
    Source code
     => (f p.1 q.2 + f q.1 p.2)) /\
      (fun
    q
    Source code
     => f q.1 q.2) \o shift p = cst (f p.1 p.2) +
        (fun
    q
    Source code
     => f p.1 q.2 + f q.1 p.2) +o_ (0 : U * V') id.
    Proof.
    move=> fc; split=> [q|].
      by apply: (@continuousD _ _ _ (fun
    q
    Source code
     => f p.1 q.2) (fun
    q
    Source code
     => f q.1 p.2));
        move=> A /(fc (_.1, _.2)) /= /nbhs_ballP [_ /posnumP[e] fpqe_A];
        apply/nbhs_ballP; exists e%:num => //= r [? ?]; exact: (fpqe_A (_.1, _.2)).
    apply/eqaddoE; rewrite funeqE => q /=.
    rewrite linearDr !linearDl -addrA addrC addrA [_ + f p.1 p.2]addrC.
    by congr (_ + _); rewrite -[LHS]/((fun
    p
    Source code
     => f p.1 p.2) q) bilinear_eqo.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    diff_bilin
    Source code
     (
    U
    Source code
    V'
    Source code
    W'
    Source code
     : normedModType R) (
    f
    Source code
     : {bilinear U -> V' -> W'})
    p
    Source code
     :
      continuous (fun
    p
    Source code
     => f p.1 p.2) -> 'd (fun
    q
    Source code
     => f q.1 q.2) p =
      (fun
    q
    Source code
     => f p.1 q.2 + f q.1 p.2) :> (U * V' -> W').
    Proof.
    pose d
    q
    Source code
     := f p.1 q.2 + f q.1 p.2.
    move=> fc; have lind : linear d.
      by move=> ? ? ?; rewrite /d linearPr linearPl scalerDr addrACA.
    pose dlM := GRing.isLinear.Build _ _ _ _ _ lind.
    pose dL : {linear _ -> _} := HB.pack d dlM.
    rewrite -/d -[d]/(dL : _ -> _).
    by apply/diff_unique; have [] := dbilin p fc.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    differentiable_bilin
    Source code
     (
    U
    Source code
    V'
    Source code
    W'
    Source code
     : normedModType R)
      (
    f
    Source code
     : {bilinear U -> V' -> W'})
    p
    Source code
     :
      continuous (fun
    p
    Source code
     => f p.1 p.2) -> differentiable (fun
    p
    Source code
     => f p.1 p.2) p.
    Proof.
    by move=> fc; apply/diff_locallyP; rewrite diff_bilin //; apply: dbilin p fc.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    mulr_is_bilinear
    Source code
     :
      bilinear_for
        (GRing.Scale.Law.clone _ _ *:%R _) (GRing.Scale.Law.clone _ _ *:%R _)
        (@GRing.mul R).
    Proof.
    split=> [u'|u] a x y /=.
    - by rewrite mulrDl scalerAl.
    - by rewrite mulrDr scalerAr.
    Qed.
    HB
    Source code
    .
    instance
    Source code
    Definition
    Source code
    _
    Source code
    :=
    Source code
    bilinear_isBilinear
    Source code
    .Build R R R R _ _ (@GRing.mul R)
      mulr_is_bilinear.

    Global Instance
    is_diff_mulr
    Source code
     (
    p
    Source code
     : R * R) :
      is_diff p (fun q => q.1 * q.2) (fun
    q
    Source code
     => p.1 * q.2 + q.1 * p.2).
    Proof.
    apply: DiffDef; last by rewrite diff_bilin // => ?; apply: mul_continuous.
    by apply: differentiable_bilin =>?; apply: mul_continuous.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    eqo_pair
    Source code
     (
    U
    Source code
    V'
    Source code
    W'
    Source code
     : normedModType R) (
    F
    Source code
     : filter_on U)
      (
    f
    Source code
     : U -> V') (
    g
    Source code
     : U -> W') :
      (fun
    t
    Source code
     => ([o_F id of f] t, [o_F id of g] t)) =o_F id.
    Proof.
    apply/eqoP => _/posnumP[e]; near=> x; rewrite num_ge_max /=.
    by apply/andP; split; near: x; apply: littleoP.
    Unshelve. all: by end_near. Qed.

    Fact
    dpair
    Source code
     (
    U
    Source code
    V'
    Source code
    W'
    Source code
     : normedModType R) (
    f
    Source code
     : U -> V') (
    g
    Source code
     : U -> W')
    x
    Source code
     :
      differentiable f x -> differentiable g x ->
      continuous (fun
    y
    Source code
     => ('d f x y, 'd g x y)) /\
      (fun
    y
    Source code
     => (f y, g y)) \o shift x = cst (f x, g x) +
      (fun
    y
    Source code
     => ('d f x y, 'd g x y)) +o_ 0 id.
    Proof.
    move=> df dg; split=> [?|]; first by apply: cvg_pair; apply: diff_continuous.
    apply/eqaddoE; rewrite funeqE => y /=.
    rewrite ![_ (_ + x)]diff_locallyx//.
    (* fixme *)
    have -> : forall
    h
    Source code
    e
    Source code
    , (f x + 'd f x y + [o_ 0 id of h] y,
      g x + 'd g x y + [o_ 0 id of e] y) =
      (f x, g x) + ('d f x y, 'd g x y) +
      ([o_ 0 id of h] y, [o_ 0id of e] y) by [].
    by congr (_ + _); rewrite -[LHS]/((fun
    y
    Source code
     => (_ y, _ y)) y) eqo_pair.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    diff_pair
    Source code
     (
    U
    Source code
    V'
    Source code
    W'
    Source code
     : normedModType R) (
    f
    Source code
     : U -> V') (
    g
    Source code
     : U -> W')
    x
    Source code
     :
      differentiable f x -> differentiable g x -> 'd (fun
    y
    Source code
     => (f y, g y)) x =
      (fun
    y
    Source code
     => ('d f x y, 'd g x y)) :> (U -> V' * W').
    Proof.
    move=> df dg.
    pose d
    y
    Source code
     := ('d f x y, 'd g x y).
    have lin_pair : linear d by move=> ???; rewrite /d !linearPZ.
    pose pairlM := GRing.isLinear.Build _ _ _ _ _ lin_pair.
    pose pairL : {linear _ -> _} := HB.pack d pairlM.
    rewrite -/d -[d]/(pairL : _ -> _).
    by apply: diff_unique; have [] := dpair df dg.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    differentiable_pair
    Source code
     (
    U
    Source code
    V'
    Source code
    W'
    Source code
     : normedModType R) (
    f
    Source code
     : U -> V')
      (
    g
    Source code
     : U -> W')
    x
    Source code
     : differentiable f x -> differentiable g x ->
      differentiable (fun
    y
    Source code
     => (f y, g y)) x.
    Proof.
    by move=> df dg; apply/diff_locallyP; rewrite diff_pair //; apply: dpair.
    Qed.

    Global Instance
    is_diff_pair
    Source code
     (
    U
    Source code
    V'
    Source code
    W'
    Source code
     : normedModType R) (
    f
    Source code
    df
    Source code
     : U -> V')
      (
    g
    Source code
    dg
    Source code
     : U -> W')
    x
    Source code
     : is_diff x f df -> is_diff x g dg ->
       is_diff x (fun y => (f y, g y)) (fun
    y
    Source code
     => (df y, dg y)).
    Proof.
    move=> dfx dgx; apply: DiffDef; first exact: differentiable_pair.
    by rewrite diff_pair // !diff_val.
    Qed.

    Global Instance
    is_diffM
    Source code
     (
    f
    Source code
    g
    Source code
    df
    Source code
    dg
    Source code
     : V -> R)
    x
    Source code
     :
      is_diff x f df -> is_diff x g dg -> is_diff x (f * g) (f x *: dg + g x *: df).
    Proof.
    move=> dfx dgx.
    have -> : f * g = (fun
    p
    Source code
     => p.1 * p.2) \o (fun
    y
    Source code
     => (f y, g y)) by [].
    apply: is_diff_eq.
    by rewrite funeqE => ?; rewrite /= [_ * g _]mulrC.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    diffM
    Source code
     (
    f
    Source code
    g
    Source code
     : V -> R)
    x
    Source code
     :
      differentiable f x -> differentiable g x ->
      'd (f * g) x = f x \*: 'd g x + g x \*: 'd f x :> (V -> R).
    Proof.
    by move=> /differentiableP df /differentiableP dg; rewrite [LHS]diff_val.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    differentiableM
    Source code
     (
    f
    Source code
    g
    Source code
     : V -> R)
    x
    Source code
     :
      differentiable f x -> differentiable g x -> differentiable (f * g) x.
    Proof.
    by move=> /differentiableP df /differentiableP dg. Qed.

    Fact
    dinv
    Source code
     (
    x
    Source code
     : R) :
      x != 0 -> continuous (fun
    h
    Source code
     : R => - x ^- 2 *: h) /\
      (fun
    x
    Source code
     => x^-1)%R \o shift x = cst (x^-1)%R +
      (fun
    h
    Source code
     : R => - x ^- 2 *: h) +o_ 0 id.
    Proof.
    move=> xn0; split; first by move=> ?; exact: continuousZl_tmp.
    apply/eqaddoP => _ /posnumP[e]; near=> h.
    have hDx_neq0 : h + x != 0.
      near: h; rewrite !nbhs_simpl; apply/nbhs_normP.
      exists `|x|; first by rewrite /= normr_gt0.
      move=> h /=; rewrite /= distrC subr0 -subr_gt0 => lthx.
      rewrite -(normr_gt0 (h + x)) addrC -[h]opprK.
      apply: lt_le_trans (ler_dist_dist _ _).
      by rewrite ger0_norm normrN //; apply: ltW.
    rewrite !fctE/= opprD scaleNr opprK.
    suff: `|h * h| / `|h + x| / `|x * x| <= e%:num * `|h|.
      rewrite -2!normf_div -mulrA -invfM; congr (`|_| <= _).
      apply/(canLR (mulfK _)); rewrite ?mulf_neq0//.
      rewrite mulrDl mulKf// [(_ + _) * _]mulrC mulrDr mulrN.
      rewrite -mulrA mulfK// -mulrA mulVKf ?mulf_neq0//.
      by rewrite [- _ + _]addrC !mulrDl [x * h]mulrC addrKA subrKC.
    rewrite ler_pdivrMr ?normr_gt0 ?mulf_neq0 // mulrAC ler_pdivrMr ?normr_gt0 //.
    have : `|h * h| <= `|x / 2| * (e%:num * `|x * x| * `|h|).
      rewrite !mulrA; near: h; exists (`|x / 2| * e%:num * `|x * x|).
        by rewrite /= !pmulr_rgt0 // normr_gt0 mulf_neq0.
      by move=> h /ltW; rewrite distrC subr0 [`|h * _|]normrM => /ler_pM; apply.
    move=> /le_trans -> //; rewrite [leLHS]mulrC ler_pM ?mulr_ge0 //.
    near: h; exists (`|x| / 2); first by rewrite /= divr_gt0 ?normr_gt0.
    move=> h; rewrite /= distrC subr0 => lthhx; rewrite addrC -[h]opprK.
    apply: le_trans (@ler_dist_dist _ R _ _).
    rewrite normrN [leRHS]ger0_norm.
      rewrite subr_ge0; apply: ltW; apply: lt_le_trans lthhx _.
      by rewrite ler_pdivrMr // -{1}(mulr1 `|x|) ler_pM // ler1n.
    rewrite lerBrDr -lerBrDl (splitr `|x|).
    rewrite normf_div (@ger0_norm _ 2) // addrK; apply/ltW.
    Unshelve. all: by end_near. Qed.

    Lemma
    diff_Rinv
    Source code
     (
    x
    Source code
     : R) : x != 0 ->
      'd GRing.inv x = (fun
    h
    Source code
     : R => - x ^- 2 *: h) :> (R -> R).
    Proof.
    move=> xn0; have -> : (fun
    h
    Source code
     : R => - x ^- 2 *: h) = ( *:%R (- x ^- 2)) by [].
    by apply: diff_unique; have [] := dinv xn0.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    differentiable_Rinv
    Source code
     (
    x
    Source code
     : R) : x != 0 ->
      differentiable (GRing.inv : R -> R) x.
    Proof.
    by move=> xn0; apply/diff_locallyP; rewrite diff_Rinv //; apply: dinv.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    diffV
    Source code
     (
    f
    Source code
     : V -> R)
    x
    Source code
     : differentiable f x -> f x != 0 ->
      'd (fun
    y
    Source code
     => (f y)^-1) x = - (f x) ^- 2 \*: 'd f x :> (V -> R).
    Proof.
    move=> df fxn0.
    by rewrite [LHS](diff_comp df (differentiable_Rinv fxn0)) diff_Rinv.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    differentiableV
    Source code
     (
    f
    Source code
     : V -> R)
    x
    Source code
     :
      differentiable f x -> f x != 0 -> differentiable (fun
    y
    Source code
     => (f y)^-1) x.
    Proof.
    by move=> df fxn0; apply: differentiable_comp _ (differentiable_Rinv fxn0).
    Qed.

    Global Instance
    is_diffX
    Source code
     (
    f
    Source code
    df
    Source code
     : V -> R)
    n
    Source code
    x
    Source code
     :
      is_diff x f df -> is_diff x (f ^+ n.+1) (n.+1%:R * f x ^+ n *: df).
    Proof.
    move=> dfx; elim: n => [|n ihn]; first by rewrite expr1 expr0 mulr1 scale1r.
    rewrite exprS; apply: is_diff_eq.
    rewrite scalerA mulrCA -exprS -scalerDl.
    by rewrite [in LHS]mulr_natl exprfctE -mulrSr mulr_natl.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    differentiableX
    Source code
     (
    f
    Source code
     : V -> R)
    n
    Source code
    x
    Source code
     :
      differentiable f x -> differentiable (f ^+ n.+1) x.
    Proof.
    by move=> /differentiableP. Qed.

    Lemma
    diffX
    Source code
     (
    f
    Source code
     : V -> R)
    n
    Source code
    x
    Source code
     :
      differentiable f x ->
      'd (f ^+ n.+1) x = n.+1%:R * f x ^+ n \*: 'd f x :> (V -> R).
    Proof.
    by move=> /differentiableP df; rewrite diff_val. Qed.

    End DifferentialR3_numFieldType.

    Section DeriveRU.
    Variables (
    R
    Source code
     : numFieldType) (
    U
    Source code
     : normedModType R).
    Implicit Types f : R -> U.

    Let
    der1
    Source code
    f
    Source code
    x
    Source code
     : derivable f x 1 ->
      f \o shift x = cst (f x) + ( *:%R^~ (f^`() x)) +o_ 0 id.
    Proof.
    move=> df; apply/eqaddoE; have /derivable_nbhsP := df.
    have -> : (fun
    h
    Source code
     => (f \o shift x) h%:A) = f \o shift x.
      by rewrite funeqE=> ?; rewrite [_%:A]mulr1.
    by rewrite derive1E =>->.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    deriv1E
    Source code
    f
    Source code
    x
    Source code
     : derivable f x 1 -> 'd f x = ( *:%R^~ (f^`() x)) :> (R -> U).
    Proof.
    pose d (
    h
    Source code
     : R) := h *: (f^`() x)%classic.
    move=> df; have lin_scal : linear d by move=> ? ? ?; rewrite /d scalerDl scalerA.
    pose scallM := GRing.isLinear.Build _ _ _ _ _ lin_scal.
    pose scalL : {linear _ -> _} := HB.pack d scallM.
    rewrite -/d -[d]/(scalL : _ -> _).
    by apply: diff_unique; [apply: scalel_continuous|apply: der1].
    Qed.

    Lemma
    diff1E
    Source code
    f
    Source code
    x
    Source code
     :
      differentiable f x -> 'd f x = (fun
    h
    Source code
     => h *: f^`()%classic x) :> (R -> U).
    Proof.
    pose d (
    h
    Source code
     : R) := h *: 'd f x 1.
    move=> df; have lin_scal : linear d by move=> ? ? ?; rewrite /d scalerDl scalerA.
    pose scallM := GRing.isLinear.Build _ _ _ _ _ lin_scal.
    pose scalL : {linear _ -> _} := HB.pack d scallM.
    have -> : (fun
    h
    Source code
     => h *: f^`()%classic x) = scalL by rewrite derive1E'.
    apply: diff_unique; first exact: scalel_continuous.
    apply/eqaddoE; have /diff_locally -> := df; congr (_ + _ + _).
    by rewrite funeqE => h /=; rewrite -{1}[h]mulr1 linearZ.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    derivable1_diffP
    Source code
    f
    Source code
    x
    Source code
     : derivable f x 1 <-> differentiable f x.
    Proof.
    split=> dfx.
      by apply/diff_locallyP; rewrite deriv1E //; split;
        [apply: scalel_continuous|apply: der1].
    apply/derivable_nbhsP/eqaddoE.
    have -> : (fun
    h
    Source code
     => (f \o shift x) h%:A) = f \o shift x.
      by rewrite funeqE=> ?; rewrite [_%:A]mulr1.
    by have /diff_locally := dfx; rewrite diff1E // derive1E =>->.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    derivable_within_continuous
    Source code
    f
    Source code
     (
    i
    Source code
     : interval R) :
      {in i, forall
    x
    Source code
    , derivable f x 1} -> {within [set` i], continuous f}.
    Proof.
    move=> di; apply/continuous_in_subspaceT => z /[1!inE] zA.
    apply/differentiable_continuous; rewrite -derivable1_diffP.
    by apply: di; rewrite inE.
    Qed.

    End DeriveRU.

    Section DeriveVW.
    Variables (
    R
    Source code
     : numFieldType) (
    V
    Source code
    W
    Source code
     : normedModType R).
    Implicit Types f : V -> W.

    Lemma
    derivable1P
    Source code
    f
    Source code
    x
    Source code
    v
    Source code
     :
      derivable f x v <-> derivable (fun
    h
    Source code
     : R => f (h *: v + x)) 0 1.
    Proof.
    rewrite /derivable; set g1 := fun
    h
    Source code
     => h^-1 *: _; set g2 := fun
    h
    Source code
     => h^-1 *: _.
    suff -> : g1 = g2 by [].
    by rewrite funeqE /g1 /g2 => h /=; rewrite addr0 scale0r add0r [_%:A]mulr1.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    derivableP
    Source code
    f
    Source code
    x
    Source code
    v
    Source code
     : derivable f x v -> is_derive x v f ('D_v f x).
    Proof.
    by move=> df; apply: DeriveDef. Qed.

    Lemma
    diff_derivable
    Source code
    f
    Source code
    a
    Source code
    v
    Source code
     : differentiable f a -> derivable f a v.
    Proof.
    move=> dfa; apply/derivable1P/derivable1_diffP.
    by apply: differentiable_comp; rewrite ?scale0r ?add0r.
    Qed.

    Global Instance
    is_derive_cst
    Source code
     (
    a
    Source code
     : W) (
    x
    Source code
    v
    Source code
     : V) : is_derive x v (cst a) 0.
    Proof.
    apply: DeriveDef; last by rewrite deriveE // diff_val.
    exact/diff_derivable.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    derivable_cst
    Source code
     (
    w
    Source code
     : W) (
    x
    Source code
    v
    Source code
     : V) : derivable (cst w) x v.
    Proof.
    exact/diff_derivable. Qed.

    Lemma
    is_derive_eq
    Source code
    f
    Source code
     (
    x
    Source code
    v
    Source code
     : V) (
    df
    Source code
    f'
    Source code
     : W) :
      is_derive x v f f' -> f' = df -> is_derive x v f df.
    Proof.
    by move=> ? <-. Qed.

    End DeriveVW.
    Arguments derivable_cst {R V W}.

    Section Derive_lemmasVW.
    Variables (
    R
    Source code
     : numFieldType) (
    V
    Source code
    W
    Source code
     : normedModType R).
    Implicit Types f g : V -> W.

    Fact
    der_add
    Source code
    f
    Source code
    g
    Source code
     (
    x
    Source code
    v
    Source code
     : V) : derivable f x v -> derivable g x v ->
      (fun
    h
    Source code
     => h^-1 *: (((f + g) \o shift x) (h *: v) - (f + g) x)) @
      0^' --> 'D_v f x + 'D_v g x.
    Proof.
    move=> df dg.
    evar (fg : R -> W); rewrite [X in X @ _](_ : _ = fg) /=.
      rewrite funeqE => h.
      by rewrite !scalerDr scalerN scalerDr opprD addrACA -!scalerBr /fg.
    exact: cvgD.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    deriveD
    Source code
    f
    Source code
    g
    Source code
     (
    x
    Source code
    v
    Source code
     : V) : derivable f x v -> derivable g x v ->
      'D_v (f + g) x = 'D_v f x + 'D_v g x.
    Proof.
    by move=> df dg; apply: cvg_lim (der_add df dg). Qed.

    Lemma
    derivableD
    Source code
    f
    Source code
    g
    Source code
     (
    x
    Source code
    v
    Source code
     : V) :
      derivable f x v -> derivable g x v -> derivable (f + g) x v.
    Proof.
    move=> df dg; apply/cvg_ex; exists (derive f x v + derive g x v).
    exact: der_add.
    Qed.

    Global Instance
    is_deriveD
    Source code
    f
    Source code
    g
    Source code
     (
    x
    Source code
    v
    Source code
     : V) (
    df
    Source code
    dg
    Source code
     : W) :
      is_derive x v f df -> is_derive x v g dg -> is_derive x v (f + g) (df + dg).
    Proof.
    move=> dfx dgx; apply: DeriveDef; first exact: derivableD.
    by rewrite deriveD // !derive_val.
    Qed.

    Global Instance
    is_derive_sum
    Source code
    n
    Source code
     (
    h
    Source code
     : 'I_n -> V -> W) (
    x
    Source code
    v
    Source code
     : V)
      (
    dh
    Source code
     : 'I_n -> W) : (forall
    i
    Source code
    , is_derive x v (h i) (dh i)) ->
      is_derive x v (\sum_(
    i
    Source code
     < n) h i) (\sum_(
    i
    Source code
     < n) dh i).
    Proof.
    by elim/big_ind2 : _ => // [|] *; [exact: is_derive_cst|exact: is_deriveD].
    Qed.

    Lemma
    derivable_sum
    Source code
    n
    Source code
     (
    h
    Source code
     : 'I_n -> V -> W) (
    x
    Source code
    v
    Source code
     : V) :
      (forall
    i
    Source code
    , derivable (h i) x v) -> derivable (\sum_(
    i
    Source code
     < n) h i) x v.
    Proof.
    move=> df; suff : forall
    i
    Source code
    , is_derive x v (h i) ('D_v (h i) x) by [].
    by move=> ?; apply: derivableP.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    derive_sum
    Source code
    n
    Source code
     (
    h
    Source code
     : 'I_n -> V -> W) (
    x
    Source code
    v
    Source code
     : V) :
      (forall
    i
    Source code
    , derivable (h i) x v) ->
      'D_v (\sum_(
    i
    Source code
     < n) h i) x = \sum_(
    i
    Source code
     < n) 'D_v (h i) x.
    Proof.
    move=> df; suff dfx : forall
    i
    Source code
    , is_derive x v (h i) ('D_v (h i) x).
      by rewrite derive_val.
    by move=> ?; apply: derivableP.
    Qed.

    Fact
    der_opp
    Source code
    f
    Source code
     (
    x
    Source code
    v
    Source code
     : V) : derivable f x v ->
      (fun
    h
    Source code
     => h^-1 *: (((- f) \o shift x) (h *: v) - (- f) x)) @
      0^' --> - 'D_v f x.
    Proof.
    move=> df; evar (g : R -> W); rewrite [X in X @ _](_ : _ = g) /=.
      by rewrite funeqE => h; rewrite !scalerDr !scalerN -opprD -scalerBr /g.
    exact: cvgN.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    deriveN
    Source code
    f
    Source code
     (
    x
    Source code
    v
    Source code
     : V) : derivable f x v ->
      'D_v (- f) x = - 'D_v f x.
    Proof.
    by move=> df; apply: cvg_lim (der_opp df). Qed.

    Lemma
    derivableN
    Source code
    f
    Source code
     (
    x
    Source code
    v
    Source code
     : V) :
      derivable f x v -> derivable (- f) x v.
    Proof.
    by move=> df; apply/cvg_ex; exists (- 'D_v f x); apply: der_opp. Qed.

    Global Instance
    is_deriveN
    Source code
    f
    Source code
     (
    x
    Source code
    v
    Source code
     : V) (
    df
    Source code
     : W) :
      is_derive x v f df -> is_derive x v (- f) (- df).
    Proof.
    move=> dfx; apply: DeriveDef; first exact: derivableN.
    by rewrite deriveN // derive_val.
    Qed.

    Global Instance
    is_deriveB
    Source code
    f
    Source code
    g
    Source code
     (
    x
    Source code
    v
    Source code
     : V) (
    df
    Source code
    dg
    Source code
     : W) :
      is_derive x v f df -> is_derive x v g dg -> is_derive x v (f - g) (df - dg).
    Proof.
    by move=> ??; apply: is_derive_eq. Qed.

    Lemma
    deriveB
    Source code
    f
    Source code
    g
    Source code
     (
    x
    Source code
    v
    Source code
     : V) : derivable f x v -> derivable g x v ->
      'D_v (f - g) x = 'D_v f x - 'D_v g x.
    Proof.
    by move=> /derivableP df /derivableP dg; rewrite derive_val. Qed.

    Lemma
    derivableB
    Source code
    f
    Source code
    g
    Source code
     (
    x
    Source code
    v
    Source code
     : V) :
      derivable f x v -> derivable g x v -> derivable (f - g) x v.
    Proof.
    by move=> /derivableP df /derivableP dg. Qed.

    Fact
    der_scal
    Source code
    f
    Source code
     (
    k
    Source code
     : R) (
    x
    Source code
    v
    Source code
     : V) : derivable f x v ->
      (fun
    h
    Source code
     => h^-1 *: ((k \*: f \o shift x) (h *: v) - (k \*: f) x)) @
      0^' --> k *: 'D_v f x.
    Proof.
    move=> df; evar (h : R -> W); rewrite [X in X @ _](_ : _ = h) /=.
      rewrite funeqE => r.
      by rewrite scalerBr !scalerA mulrC -!scalerA -!scalerBr /h.
    exact: cvgZl_tmp.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    deriveZ
    Source code
    f
    Source code
     (
    k
    Source code
     : R) (
    x
    Source code
    v
    Source code
     : V) : derivable f x v ->
      'D_v (k \*: f) x = k *: 'D_v f x.
    Proof.
    by move=> df; apply: cvg_lim (der_scal df). Qed.

    Lemma
    derivableZ
    Source code
    f
    Source code
     (
    k
    Source code
     : R) (
    x
    Source code
    v
    Source code
     : V) :
      derivable f x v -> derivable (k \*: f) x v.
    Proof.
    by move=> df; apply/cvg_ex; exists (k *: 'D_v f x); apply: der_scal.
    Qed.

    Global Instance
    is_deriveZ
    Source code
    f
    Source code
     (
    k
    Source code
     : R) (
    x
    Source code
    v
    Source code
     : V) (
    df
    Source code
     : W) :
      is_derive x v f df -> is_derive x v (k \*: f) (k *: df).
    Proof.
    move=> dfx; apply: DeriveDef; first exact: derivableZ.
    by rewrite deriveZ // derive_val.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    derive_cst
    Source code
     (
    k
    Source code
     : W) (
    x
    Source code
    v
    Source code
     : V) : 'D_v (cst k) x = 0.
    Proof.
    by rewrite derive_val. Qed.

    End Derive_lemmasVW.

    Section derive_id.
    Variables (
    R
    Source code
     : numFieldType) (
    V
    Source code
     : normedModType R).

    Lemma
    derivable_id
    Source code
     (
    x
    Source code
    v
    Source code
     : V) : derivable id x v.
    Proof.
    exact/diff_derivable. Qed.

    Global Instance
    is_derive_id
    Source code
     (
    x
    Source code
    v
    Source code
     : V) : is_derive x v id v.
    Proof.
    apply: (DeriveDef (@derivable_id _ _)).
    rewrite deriveE// (@diff_lin _ _ _ idfun)//=.
    by rewrite /continuous_at.
    Qed.

    Global Instance
    is_deriveNid
    Source code
     (
    x
    Source code
    v
    Source code
     : V) : is_derive x v -%R (- v).
    Proof.
    exact: is_deriveN. Qed.

    Lemma
    derive_id
    Source code
     (
    x
    Source code
    v
    Source code
     : V) : 'D_v id x = v.
    Proof.
    by have /derivableP := @derivable_id x v; rewrite derive_val. Qed.

    End derive_id.

    Lemma
    derive1_onem
    Source code
     {
    R
    Source code
     : numFieldType} :
      (fun
    x
    Source code
     => x.~ : R^o)^`()%classic = cst (-1).
    Proof.
    by apply/funext => x; rewrite derive1E deriveB// derive_id derive_cst sub0r.
    Qed.

    Section Derive_lemmasVR.
    Variables (
    R
    Source code
     : numFieldType) (
    V
    Source code
     : normedModType R).
    Implicit Types (f g : V -> R) (x v : V).

    Fact
    der_mult
    Source code
    f
    Source code
    g
    Source code
    x
    Source code
    v
    Source code
     :
      derivable f x v -> derivable g x v ->
      (fun
    h
    Source code
     => h^-1 *: (((f * g) \o shift x) (h *: v) - (f * g) x)) @
      0^' --> f x *: 'D_v g x + g x *: 'D_v f x.
    Proof.
    move=> df dg.
    evar (fg : R -> R); rewrite [X in X @ _](_ : _ = fg) /=.
      rewrite funeqE => h.
      have -> : (f * g) (h *: v + x) - (f * g) x =
        f (h *: v + x) *: (g (h *: v + x) - g x) + g x *: (f (h *: v + x) - f x).
        by rewrite !scalerBr -addrA ![g x *: _]mulrC addKr.
      rewrite scalerDr scalerA mulrC -scalerA.
      by rewrite [_ *: (g x *: _)]scalerA mulrC -scalerA /fg.
    apply: cvgD; last exact: cvgZl_tmp df.
    apply: cvg_comp2 (@scale_continuous _ _ (_, _)) => /=; last exact: dg.
    suff : {for 0, continuous (fun
    h
    Source code
     : R => f(h *: v + x))}.
      by move=> /continuous_withinNx; rewrite scale0r add0r.
    exact/differentiable_continuous/derivable1_diffP/(derivable1P _ _ _).1.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    deriveM
    Source code
    f
    Source code
    g
    Source code
    x
    Source code
    v
    Source code
     : derivable f x v -> derivable g x v ->
      'D_v (f * g) x = f x *: 'D_v g x + g x *: 'D_v f x.
    Proof.
    by move=> df dg; apply: cvg_lim (der_mult df dg). Qed.

    Lemma
    derivableM
    Source code
    f
    Source code
    g
    Source code
    x
    Source code
    v
    Source code
     :
      derivable f x v -> derivable g x v -> derivable (f * g) x v.
    Proof.
    move=> df dg; apply/cvg_ex; exists (f x *: 'D_v g x + g x *: 'D_v f x).
    exact: der_mult.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    deriveMr
    Source code
    f
    Source code
     (
    r
    Source code
     : R)
    x
    Source code
    v
    Source code
     :
      derivable f x v -> 'D_v (r \o* f) x = r * 'D_v f x.
    Proof.
    move/deriveM => /(_ _ (derivable_cst _ _ _)) ->.
    by rewrite derive_cst scaler0 add0r.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    deriveMl
    Source code
    f
    Source code
     (
    r
    Source code
     : R)
    x
    Source code
    v
    Source code
     :
      derivable f x v -> 'D_v (r \*o f) x = r * 'D_v f x.
    Proof.
    by move=> fxv; rewrite -deriveMr// mul_funC. Qed.

    Global Instance
    is_deriveM
    Source code
    f
    Source code
    g
    Source code
    x
    Source code
    v
    Source code
     (
    df
    Source code
    dg
    Source code
     : R) :
      is_derive x v f df -> is_derive x v g dg ->
      is_derive x v (f * g) (f x *: dg + g x *: df).
    Proof.
    move=> dfx dgx; apply: DeriveDef; first exact: derivableM.
    by rewrite deriveM // !derive_val.
    Qed.

    Global Instance
    is_deriveX
    Source code
    f
    Source code
    n
    Source code
    x
    Source code
    v
    Source code
     (
    df
    Source code
     : R) :
      is_derive x v f df -> is_derive x v (f ^+ n) ((n%:R * f x ^+ n.-1) *: df).
    Proof.
    case: n => [fdf|n dfx].
      by rewrite expr0 mul0r scale0r; exact: is_derive_cst.
    elim: n => [|n ihn]; first by rewrite expr1 expr0 mulr1 scale1r.
    rewrite exprS; apply: is_derive_eq.
    rewrite scalerA -scalerDl mulrCA -[f x * _]exprS.
    by rewrite [in LHS]mulr_natl exprfctE -mulrSr mulr_natl.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    derivableX
    Source code
    f
    Source code
    n
    Source code
    x
    Source code
    v
    Source code
     : derivable f x v -> derivable (f ^+ n) x v.
    Proof.
    by case: n => [_|n /derivableP]; [rewrite expr0|]. Qed.

    Lemma
    deriveX
    Source code
    f
    Source code
    n
    Source code
    x
    Source code
    v
    Source code
     : derivable f x v ->
      'D_v (f ^+ n) x = (n%:R * f x ^+ n.-1) *: 'D_v f x.
    Proof.
    by move=> /derivableP df; rewrite derive_val. Qed.

    Fact
    der_inv
    Source code
    f
    Source code
    x
    Source code
    v
    Source code
     : f x != 0 -> derivable f x v ->
      (fun
    h
    Source code
     => h^-1 *: (((fun
    y
    Source code
     => (f y)^-1) \o shift x) (h *: v) - (f x)^-1)) @
      0^' --> - (f x) ^-2 *: 'D_v f x.
    Proof.
    move=> fxn0 df.
    have /derivable1P/derivable1_diffP/differentiable_continuous := df.
    move=> /continuous_withinNx; rewrite scale0r add0r => fc.
    have fn0 : 0^' [set
    h
    Source code
     | f (h *: v + x) != 0].
      apply: (fc [set
    x
    Source code
     | x != 0]); exists `|f x|; first by rewrite /= normr_gt0.
      move=> y; rewrite /= => yltfx.
      by apply/eqP => y0; move: yltfx; rewrite y0 subr0 ltxx.
    have : (fun
    h
    Source code
     => - ((f x)^-1 * (f (h *: v + x))^-1) *:
      (h^-1 *: (f (h *: v + x) - f x))) @ 0^' -->
      - (f x) ^- 2 *: 'D_v f x.
      by apply: cvgM => //; apply: cvgN; rewrite expr2 invfM; apply: cvgM;
         [exact: cvg_cst| exact: cvgV].
    apply: cvg_trans => A [_/posnumP[e] /= Ae].
    move: fn0; apply: filter_app; near=> h => /= fhvxn0.
    have he : ball 0 e%:num (h : R) by near: h; exists e%:num => /=.
    have hn0 : h != 0 by near: h; exists e%:num => /=.
    suff <- :
      - ((f x)^-1 * (f (h *: v + x))^-1) *: (h^-1 *: (f (h *: v + x) - f x)) =
      h^-1 *: ((f (h *: v + x))^-1 - (f x)^-1) by exact: Ae.
    rewrite scalerA mulrC -scalerA; congr (_ *: _).
    apply/eqP; rewrite scaleNr eqr_oppLR opprB scalerBr.
    rewrite -scalerA [_ *: f _]mulVf // [_%:A]mulr1.
    by rewrite mulrC -scalerA [_ *: f _]mulVf // [_%:A]mulr1.
    Unshelve. all: by end_near. Qed.

    Lemma
    deriveV
    Source code
    f
    Source code
    x
    Source code
    v
    Source code
     : f x != 0 -> derivable f x v ->
      'D_v (fun
    y
    Source code
     => (f y)^-1) x = - (f x) ^- 2 *: 'D_v f x.
    Proof.
    by move=> fxn0 df; apply: cvg_lim (der_inv fxn0 df). Qed.

    Lemma
    derivableV
    Source code
    f
    Source code
    x
    Source code
    v
    Source code
     :
      f x != 0 -> derivable f x v -> derivable (fun
    y
    Source code
     => (f y)^-1) x v.
    Proof.
    move=> df dg; apply/cvg_ex; exists (- (f x) ^- 2 *: 'D_v f x).
    exact: der_inv.
    Qed.

    End Derive_lemmasVR.

    Lemma
    derive_shift
    Source code
     {
    R
    Source code
     : numFieldType} (
    v
    Source code
    k
    Source code
     : R) :
      'D_v (shift k : R -> R) = cst v.
    Proof.
    by apply/funext => x/=; rewrite deriveD// derive_id derive_cst addr0.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    is_derive_shift
    Source code
     {
    R
    Source code
     : numFieldType}
    x
    Source code
    v
    Source code
     (
    k
    Source code
     : R) :
      is_derive x v (shift k) v.
    Proof.
    by apply: DeriveDef => //; rewrite derive_val addr0. Qed.

    Lemma
    derive1_cst
    Source code
     {
    R
    Source code
     : numFieldType} (
    V
    Source code
     : normedModType R) (
    k
    Source code
     : V)
    t
    Source code
     :
      (cst k)^`() t = 0.
    Proof.
    by rewrite derive1E derive_cst. Qed.

    Lemma
    derive1Mr
    Source code
     {
    R
    Source code
     : numFieldType} (
    f
    Source code
     : R -> R) (
    x
    Source code
    r
    Source code
     : R) :
      derivable f x 1 ->
      (fun
    x
    Source code
     => f x * r)^`()%classic x = f^`()%classic x * r.
    Proof.
    by move=> ?; rewrite derive1E deriveMr ?derive1E 1?mulrC. Qed.

    Lemma
    derive1Ml
    Source code
     {
    R
    Source code
     : numFieldType} (
    f
    Source code
     : R -> R) (
    x
    Source code
    r
    Source code
     : R) :
      derivable f x 1 ->
      (fun
    x
    Source code
     => r * f x)^`()%classic x = r * f^`()%classic x :> R.
    Proof.
    by move=> ?; rewrite derive1E deriveMl ?derive1E. Qed.

    Lemma
    exprn_derivable
    Source code
     {
    R
    Source code
     : numFieldType}
    n
    Source code
     (
    x
    Source code
     : R)
    v
    Source code
     :
      derivable (@GRing.exp R ^~ n) x v.
    Proof.
    elim: n => [/=|n ih]; first by rewrite (_ : _ ^~ _ = 1).
    rewrite (_ : _ ^~ _ = (fun
    x
    Source code
     => x * x ^+ n)).
      by apply/funext => y; rewrite exprS.
    by apply: derivableM; first exact: derivable_id.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    exp_derive
    Source code
     {
    R
    Source code
     : numFieldType}
    n
    Source code
    x
    Source code
    v
    Source code
     :
      'D_v (@GRing.exp R ^~ n) x = n%:R *: x ^+ n.-1 *: v.
    Proof.
    have /= := @deriveX R R id n x v (@derivable_id _ _ _ _).
    by rewrite fctE => ->; rewrite derive_id.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    exp_derive1
    Source code
     {
    R
    Source code
     : numFieldType}
    n
    Source code
    x
    Source code
     :
      (@GRing.exp R ^~ n)^`() x = n%:R *: x ^+ n.-1.
    Proof.
    by rewrite derive1E exp_derive [LHS]mulr1. Qed.

    Lemma
    compact_EVT_max
    Source code
     (
    T
    Source code
     : topologicalType) (
    R
    Source code
     : realType) (
    f
    Source code
     : T -> R)
        (
    A
    Source code
     : set T) :
      A !=set0 -> compact A -> {within A, continuous f} ->
      exists2
    c
    Source code
    , c \in A & forall
    t
    Source code
    , t \in A -> f t <= f c.
    Proof.
    move=> A0 cA cf.
    have sup_fA : has_sup (f @` A).
      by apply/compact_has_sup; [exact: image_nonempty A0|exact/continuous_compact].
    have [|imf_ltsup] := pselect (exists2
    c
    Source code
    , c \in A & f c = sup (f @` A)).
      move=> [c cinA fcsupfA]; exists c => // t tA; rewrite fcsupfA.
      by apply/sup_upper_bound => //; exact/imageP/set_mem.
    have {}AfsupfA t : t \in A -> f t < sup (f @` A).
      move=> tA; have [//|supfAft] := ltrP (f t) (sup (f @` A)).
      rewrite falseE; apply: imf_ltsup; exists t => //.
      apply/eqP; rewrite eq_le supfAft andbT sup_upper_bound//.
      exact/imageP/set_mem.
    pose g
    t
    Source code
     : R := (sup (f @` A) - f t)^-1.
    have invf_continuous : {within A, continuous g}.
      rewrite continuous_subspace_in => t tA; apply: cvgV => //=.
        by rewrite subr_eq0 gt_eqF// AfsupfA//; rewrite inE in tA.
      by apply: cvgD; [exact: cst_continuous | apply: cvgN; exact: cf].
    have /ex_strict_bound_gt0[k k_gt0 /= imVfltk] : bounded_set (g @` A).
      exact/compact_bounded/continuous_compact.
    have [_ [t tA <-]] : exists2
    y
    Source code
    , (f @` A) y & sup (f @` A) - k^-1 < y.
      by apply: sup_adherent => //; rewrite invr_gt0.
    rewrite ltrBlDr -ltrBlDl.
    suff : sup (f @` A) - f t > k^-1 by move=> /ltW; rewrite leNgt => /negbTE ->.
    rewrite invf_plt ?posrE ?subr_gt0 ?AfsupfA//; first exact/mem_set.
    by rewrite (le_lt_trans (ler_norm _))// imVfltk//; exact: imageP.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    compact_EVT_min
    Source code
     (
    T
    Source code
     : topologicalType) (
    R
    Source code
     : realType) (
    f
    Source code
     : T -> R)
        (
    A
    Source code
     : set T) :
      A !=set0 -> compact A -> {within A, continuous f} ->
      exists2
    c
    Source code
    , c \in A & forall
    t
    Source code
    , t \in A -> f c <= f t.
    Proof.
    move=> A0 cA cf.
    have /(compact_EVT_max A0 cA)[c cinA fcmin] : {within A, continuous (- f)}.
      by move=> ?; apply: continuousN => ?; exact: cf.
    by exists c => // t tA; rewrite -lerN2 fcmin.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    EVT_max
    Source code
     (
    R
    Source code
     : realType) (
    f
    Source code
     : R -> R) (
    a
    Source code
    b
    Source code
     : R) :
      a <= b -> {within `[a, b], continuous f} ->
      exists2
    c
    Source code
    , c \in `[a, b]%R & forall
    t
    Source code
    , t \in `[a, b]%R -> f t <= f c.
    Proof.
    move=> ab cf.
    have ab0 : `[a, b] !=set0 by exists a => /=; rewrite in_itv/= lexx.
    have [/= c cab maxf] := compact_EVT_max ab0 (@segment_compact _ a b) cf.
    by rewrite inE in cab; exists c => //= t tab; apply: maxf; rewrite inE.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    EVT_min
    Source code
     (
    R
    Source code
     : realType) (
    f
    Source code
     : R -> R) (
    a
    Source code
    b
    Source code
     : R) :
      a <= b -> {within `[a, b], continuous f} ->
      exists2
    c
    Source code
    , c \in `[a, b]%R & forall
    t
    Source code
    , t \in `[a, b]%R -> f c <= f t.
    Proof.
    move=> ab cf.
    have ab0 : `[a, b] !=set0 by exists a => /=; rewrite in_itv/= lexx.
    have [/= c cab minf] := compact_EVT_min ab0 (@segment_compact _ a b) cf.
    by rewrite inE in cab; exists c => //= t tab; apply: minf; rewrite inE.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    EVT_max_rV
    Source code
     (
    R
    Source code
     : realType)
    n
    Source code
     (
    f
    Source code
     : 'rV[R]_n -> R) (
    A
    Source code
     : set 'rV[R]_n) :
        A !=set0 -> compact A -> {within A, continuous f} ->
      exists2
    c
    Source code
    , c \in A & forall
    t
    Source code
    , t \in A -> f t <= f c.
    Proof.
    by move=> A0 cA cf; exact: compact_EVT_max. Qed.

    Lemma
    EVT_min_rV
    Source code
     (
    R
    Source code
     : realType)
    n
    Source code
     (
    f
    Source code
     : 'rV[R]_n -> R) (
    A
    Source code
     : set 'rV[R]_n) :
      A !=set0 -> compact A -> {within A, continuous f} ->
      exists2
    c
    Source code
    , c \in A & forall
    t

    , t \in A -> f c <= f t.
    Proof.
    by move=> A0 cA cf; exact: compact_EVT_min. Qed.

    Lemma
    cvg_at_rightE
    Source code
     (
    R
    Source code
     : numFieldType) (
    V
    Source code
     : normedModType R) (
    f
    Source code
     : R -> V)
    x
    Source code
     :
      cvg (f @ x^') -> lim (f @ x^') = lim (f @ at_right x).
    Proof.
    move=> cvfx; apply/esym/(@cvg_lim _ _ _ (at_right _)) => //.
    move=> A /cvfx /nbhs_ballP [_ /posnumP[e] xe_A].
    by exists e%:num => //= y xe_y /gt_eqF/negbT/xe_A; exact.
    Qed.
    Arguments cvg_at_rightE {R V} f x.

    Lemma
    cvg_at_leftE
    Source code
     (
    R
    Source code
     : numFieldType) (
    V
    Source code
     : normedModType R) (
    f
    Source code
     : R -> V)
    x
    Source code
     :
      cvg (f @ x^') -> lim (f @ x^') = lim (f @ at_left x).
    Proof.
    move=> cvfx; apply/esym/(@cvg_lim _ _ _ (at_left _)) => //.
    move=> A /cvfx /nbhs_ballP [_ /posnumP[e] xe_A].
    by exists e%:num => //= y xe_y /lt_eqF/negbT/xe_A; exact.
    Qed.
    Arguments cvg_at_leftE {R V} f x.

    Lemma
    derive1_at_max
    Source code
     (
    R
    Source code
     : realFieldType) (
    f
    Source code
     : R -> R) (
    a
    Source code
    b
    Source code
    c
    Source code
     : R) :
      a <= b -> (forall
    t
    Source code
    , t \in `]a, b[%R -> derivable f t 1) -> c \in `]a, b[%R ->
      (forall
    t
    Source code
    , t \in `]a, b[%R -> f t <= f c) -> is_derive c 1 f 0.
    Proof.
    move=> leab fdrvbl cab cmax; apply: DeriveDef; first exact: fdrvbl.
    apply/eqP; rewrite eq_le; apply/andP; split.
      rewrite ['D_1 f c]cvg_at_rightE; first exact: fdrvbl.
      apply: limr_le.
        have /fdrvbl dfc := cab.
        rewrite -(cvg_at_rightE (fun
    h
    Source code
     : R => h^-1 *: ((f \o shift c) _ - f c))) //.
        apply: cvg_trans dfc; apply: cvg_app.
        move=> A [e egt0 Ae]; exists e => // x xe xgt0; apply: Ae => //.
        exact/lt0r_neq0.
      near=> h; apply: mulr_ge0_le0.
        by rewrite invr_ge0; apply: ltW; near: h; exists 1 => /=.
      rewrite subr_le0 [_%:A]mulr1; apply: cmax; near: h.
      exists (b - c); first by rewrite /= subr_gt0 (itvP cab).
      move=> h; rewrite /= distrC subr0 /= in_itv /= -ltrBrDr.
      move=> /(le_lt_trans (ler_norm _)) -> /ltr_pDl -> //.
      by rewrite (itvP cab).
    rewrite ['D_1 f c]cvg_at_leftE; first exact: fdrvbl.
    apply: limr_ge.
      have /fdrvbl dfc := cab; rewrite -(cvg_at_leftE (fun
    h
    Source code
     => h^-1 *: ((f \o shift c) _ - f c))) //.
      apply: cvg_trans dfc; apply: cvg_app.
      move=> A [e egt0 Ae]; exists e => // x xe xgt0; apply: Ae => //.
      exact/ltr0_neq0.
    near=> h; apply: mulr_le0.
      by rewrite invr_le0; apply: ltW; near: h; exists 1 => /=.
    rewrite subr_le0 [_%:A]mulr1; apply: cmax; near: h.
    exists (c - a); first by rewrite /= subr_gt0 (itvP cab).
    move=> h; rewrite /= distrC subr0.
    move=> /ltr_normlP []; rewrite ltrBrDl ltrBlDl in_itv /= => -> _.
    by move=> /ltr_nDl -> //; rewrite (itvP cab).
    Unshelve. all: by end_near. Qed.

    Lemma
    derive1_at_min
    Source code
     (
    R
    Source code
     : realFieldType) (
    f
    Source code
     : R -> R) (
    a
    Source code
    b
    Source code
    c
    Source code
     : R) :
      a <= b -> (forall
    t
    Source code
    , t \in `]a, b[%R -> derivable f t 1) -> c \in `]a, b[%R ->
      (forall
    t
    Source code
    , t \in `]a, b[%R -> f c <= f t) -> is_derive c 1 f 0.
    Proof.
    move=> leab fdrvbl cab cmin; apply: DeriveDef; first exact: fdrvbl.
    apply/eqP; rewrite -oppr_eq0; apply/eqP.
    rewrite -deriveN; first exact: fdrvbl.
    suff df : is_derive c 1 (- f) 0 by rewrite derive_val.
    apply: derive1_at_max leab _ (cab) _ => t tab; first exact/derivableN/fdrvbl.
    by rewrite lerN2; apply: cmin.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    Rolle
    Source code
     (
    R
    Source code
     : realType) (
    f
    Source code
     : R -> R) (
    a
    Source code
    b
    Source code
     : R) :
      a < b -> (forall
    x
    Source code
    , x \in `]a, b[%R -> derivable f x 1) ->
      {within `[a, b], continuous f} -> f a = f b ->
      exists2
    c
    Source code
    , c \in `]a, b[%R & is_derive c 1 f 0.
    Proof.
    move=> ltab fdrvbl fcont faefb.
    have [cmax cmaxab fcmax] := EVT_max (ltW ltab) fcont.
    have [cmaxeaVb|] := boolP (cmax \in [set a; b]); last first.
      rewrite notin_setE => /not_orP[/eqP cnea /eqP cneb].
      have {}cmaxab : cmax \in `]a, b[%R.
        by rewrite in_itv /= !lt_def !(itvP cmaxab) cnea eq_sym cneb.
      exists cmax => //; apply: derive1_at_max (ltW ltab) fdrvbl cmaxab _ => t tab.
      by apply: fcmax; rewrite in_itv /= !ltW // (itvP tab).
    have [cmin cminab fcmin] := EVT_min (ltW ltab) fcont.
    have [cmineaVb|] := boolP (cmin \in [set a; b]); last first.
      rewrite notin_setE => /not_orP[/eqP cnea /eqP cneb].
      have {}cminab : cmin \in `]a, b[%R.
        by rewrite in_itv /= !lt_def !(itvP cminab) cnea eq_sym cneb.
      exists cmin => //; apply: derive1_at_min (ltW ltab) fdrvbl cminab _ => t tab.
      by apply: fcmin; rewrite in_itv /= !ltW // (itvP tab).
    have midab : (a + b) / 2 \in `]a, b[%R by apply: mid_in_itvoo.
    exists ((a + b) / 2) => //; apply: derive1_at_max (ltW ltab) fdrvbl (midab) _.
    move=> t tab.
    suff fcst s : s \in `]a, b[%R -> f s = f cmax by rewrite !fcst.
    move=> sab.
    apply/eqP; rewrite eq_le fcmax; first by rewrite in_itv /= !ltW ?(itvP sab).
    suff -> : f cmax = f cmin by rewrite fcmin // in_itv /= !ltW ?(itvP sab).
    by move: cmaxeaVb cmineaVb; rewrite 2!inE => -[|] -> [|] ->.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    MVT
    Source code
     (
    R
    Source code
     : realType) (
    f
    Source code
    df
    Source code
     : R -> R) (
    a
    Source code
    b
    Source code
     : R) :
      a < b -> (forall
    x
    Source code
    , x \in `]a, b[%R -> is_derive x 1 f (df x)) ->
      {within `[a, b], continuous f} ->
      exists2
    c
    Source code
    , c \in `]a, b[%R & f b - f a = df c * (b - a).
    Proof.
    move=> altb fdrvbl fcont.
    set g := f + (- ( *:%R^~ ((f b - f a) / (b - a)) : R -> R)).
    have gdrvbl x : x \in `]a, b[%R -> derivable g x 1.
      by move=> /fdrvbl dfx; apply/derivableB/derivable1_diffP.
    have gcont : {within `[a, b], continuous g}.
      move=> x; apply: continuousD _ ; first exact: fcont.
      exact/continuousN/continuous_subspaceT/scalel_continuous.
    have gaegb : g a = g b.
      rewrite /g -![(_ - _ : _ -> _) _]/(_ - _).
      apply/eqP; rewrite -subr_eq /= opprK addrAC -addrA -scalerBl.
      rewrite [_ *: _]mulrC divfK; last by rewrite addrC subrK.
      by apply: lt0r_neq0; rewrite subr_gt0.
    have [c cab dgc0] := Rolle altb gdrvbl gcont gaegb.
    exists c; first exact: cab.
    have /fdrvbl dfc := cab; move/@derive_val: dgc0; rewrite deriveB //.
    move/eqP; rewrite [X in _ - X]deriveE // derive_val diff_val scale1r subr_eq0.
    by move/eqP->; rewrite divfK// subr_eq0 gt_eqF.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    MVT_segment
    Source code
     (
    R
    Source code
     : realType) (
    f
    Source code
    df
    Source code
     : R -> R) (
    a
    Source code
    b
    Source code
     : R) :
      a <= b -> (forall
    x
    Source code
    , x \in `]a, b[%R -> is_derive x 1 f (df x)) ->
      {within `[a, b], continuous f} ->
      exists2
    c
    Source code
    , c \in `[a, b]%R & f b - f a = df c * (b - a).
    Proof.
    move=> leab fdrvbl fcont; case: ltgtP leab => // [altb|aeb]; last first.
      by exists a; [rewrite inE/= aeb lexx|rewrite aeb !subrr mulr0].
    have [c cab D] := MVT altb fdrvbl fcont.
    by exists c => //; rewrite in_itv /= ltW (itvP cab).
    Qed.

    Section ger0_derive1_le.
    Context {
    R
    Source code
     : realType}.
    Variables (
    f
    Source code
     : R -> R) (
    a
    Source code
    b
    Source code
     : R).
    Hypothesis
    df
    Source code
     : forall
    x
    Source code
    , x \in `]a, b[%R -> derivable f x 1.
    Hypothesis
    dfge0
    Source code
     : forall
    x
    Source code
    , x \in `]a, b[%R -> 0 <= f^`() x.

    Lemma
    ger0_derive1_le
    Source code
     (
    sa
    Source code
    sb
    Source code
     : bool) :
      {within [set` (Interval (BSide sa a) (BSide sb b))], continuous f} ->
      {in Interval (BSide sa a) (BSide sb b) &, {homo f :
    x
    Source code
    y
    Source code
     / x <= y}}.
    Proof.
    move=> cf x y + + xy.
    move: (xy); rewrite le_eqVlt=> /predU1P[-> | xy']; first by rewrite lexx.
    rewrite !itv_boundlr -subr_ge0 /= => /andP[ax _] /andP[_ yb].
    have HMVT1 : {within `[x, y], continuous f}.
      exact/(continuous_subspaceW _ cf)/subset_itv.
    have zab : `]x, y[ `<=` `]a, b[.
      clear -ax yb; apply/subset_itv.
        by move: sa ax => []; rewrite !bnd_simp// => /ltW.
      by move: sb yb => []; rewrite !bnd_simp// => /ltW.
    have HMVT0 z : z \in `]x, y[%R -> is_derive z 1 f (f^`() z).
      by move=> zxy; rewrite derive1E; exact/derivableP/df/zab.
    have[z zxy ->]:= MVT xy' HMVT0 HMVT1.
    by rewrite mulr_ge0// ?subr_ge0// dfge0// zab.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    ger0_derive1_le_cc
    Source code
     : {within `[a, b] , continuous f} ->
      {in `[a, b]%R &, {homo f :
    x
    Source code
    y
    Source code
     / x <= y >-> x <= y}}.
    Proof.
    exact: ger0_derive1_le. Qed.

    Lemma
    ger0_derive1_le_co
    Source code
     : {within `[a, b[ , continuous f} ->
      {in `[a, b[%R &, {homo f :
    x
    Source code
    y
    Source code
     / x <= y >-> x <= y}}.
    Proof.
    exact: ger0_derive1_le. Qed.

    ger0_derive1_le_oc
    Source code
     : {within `]a, b], continuous f} ->
      {in `]a, b]%R &, {homo f :
    x
    Source code
    y
    Source code
     / x <= y >-> x <= y}}.
    Proof.
    exact: ger0_derive1_le. Qed.

    Lemma
    ger0_derive1_le_oo
    Source code
     : {in `]a, b[, continuous f} ->
      {in `]a, b[%R &, {homo f :
    x
    Source code
    y
    Source code
     / x <= y >-> x <= y}}.
    Proof.
    by rewrite -continuous_open_subspace//; exact: ger0_derive1_le. Qed.

    End ger0_derive1_le.

    Section ler0_derive1_le.
    Context {
    R
    Source code
     : realType}.
    Variables (
    f
    Source code
     : R -> R) (
    a
    Source code
    b
    Source code
     : R).
    Hypothesis
    df
    Source code
     : forall
    x
    Source code
    , x \in `]a, b[%R -> derivable f x 1.
    Hypothesis
    dfle0
    Source code
     : forall
    x
    Source code
    , x \in `]a, b[%R -> f^`() x <= 0.

    Lemma
    ler0_derive1_le
    Source code
     (
    sa
    Source code
    sb
    Source code
     : bool) :
      {within [set` (Interval (BSide sa a) (BSide sb b))], continuous f} ->
      {in Interval (BSide sa a) (BSide sb b) &, {homo f :
    x
    Source code
    y
    Source code
     /~ x <= y}}.
    Proof.
    move=> cf.
    suff : {in Interval (BSide sa a) (BSide sb b) &, {homo (- f) :
    x
    Source code
    y
    Source code
     / x <= y}}.
      by move=> h y x iy ix xy; move: (h x y ix iy xy); rewrite opprfctE lerNl opprK.
    apply: ger0_derive1_le.
    - move => x xab; exact/derivableN/df.
    - move => x xab; rewrite derive1E deriveN; first exact: df.
      by rewrite -derive1E oppr_ge0 dfle0.
    by move=> x; exact/continuousN/cf.
    Qed.

    Section gtr0_derive1_lt.
    Context {

    Source code

    Source code

      {within [set` (Interval (BSide sa a) (BSide sb b))], continuous f} ->
      {in Interval (BSide sa a) (BSide sb b) &, {homo f :
    x

    rewrite !itv_boundlr /= -subr_gt0 => /andP [] ax ? /andP [] ? yb.

    have zab : `]x, y[ `<=` `]a, b[.
      clear -ax yb; apply/subset_itv.

      by move: sb yb => []; rewrite !bnd_simp// => /ltW.
    have HMVT0 (
    z

     : R^o) : z \in `]x, y[%R -> is_derive z 1 f (f^`() z).
