    #[deprecated(since="mathcomp-analysis 1.10.0",
      note="use `ler0_derive1_lt_cc` instead")]
    Lemma
    ltr0_derive1_decr
    Source code
     (
    R
    Source code
     : realType) (
    f
    Source code
     : R -> R) (
    a
    Source code
    b
    Source code
     : R) :
      (forall
    x
    Source code
    , x \in `]a, b[%R -> derivable f x 1) ->
      (forall
    x
    Source code
    , x \in `]a, b[%R -> f^`() x < 0) ->
      {within `[a, b], continuous f}%classic ->
      forall
    x
    Source code
    y
    Source code
    , a <= x -> x < y -> y <= b -> f y < f x.
    Proof.
    move=> df f'0 cf x y ax xy yb.
    apply: ltr0_derive1_lt_cc; [ exact: df | exact: f'0 | by [] | | | by [] ];
      rewrite !in_itv/= ?ax ?yb ?andbT/=.
      by rewrite (le_trans _ (ltW xy)).
    by rewrite (le_trans (ltW xy)).
    Qed.

    #[global] Hint Extern 0 (is_true (_ <= ?x)) => match goal with
        H : x \is_near _ |- _ =>
          solve[near: x; apply: nbhs_pinfty_ge; apply: num_real]
      end : core.
    #[global] Hint Extern 0 (is_true (?x <= _)) => match goal with
        H : x \is_near _ |- _ =>
          solve[near: x; apply: nbhs_ninfty_le; apply: num_real]
      end : core.

    Lemma
    ler0_derive1_nincry
    Source code
     {
    R
    Source code
     : realType} (
    f
    Source code
     : R -> R) (
    a
    Source code
     : R) :
      (forall
    x
    Source code
    , x \in `]a, +oo[%R -> derivable f x 1) ->
      (forall
    x
    Source code
    , x \in `]a, +oo[%R -> f^`() x <= 0) ->
      {within `[a, +oo[, continuous f} ->
      forall
    x
    Source code
    y
    Source code
    , a <= x -> x <= y -> f y <= f x.
    Proof.
    move=> df dfle0 cf x y ax xy.
    near (pinfty_nbhs R)%R => N.
    apply: (@ler0_derive1_le_cc _ _ a N) => [r|r| | | | // ]; rewrite ?in_itv/=.
    - by move=> /andP[ar rN]; apply: df; rewrite !in_itv/= andbT ar.
    - by move=> /andP[ar rN]; apply: dfle0; rewrite !in_itv/= andbT ar.
    - exact/continuous_subspaceW/cf/subset_itvl.
    - by rewrite (le_trans ax)/=.
    - by rewrite ax/=.
    Unshelve. all: end_near. Qed.

    Lemma
    ler0_derive1_nincrNy
    Source code
     {
    R
    Source code
     : realType} (
    f
    Source code
     : R -> R) (
    b
    Source code
     : R) :
      (forall
    x
    Source code
    , x \in `]-oo, b[%R -> derivable f x 1) ->
      (forall
    x
    Source code
    , x \in `]-oo, b[%R -> f^`() x <= 0) ->
      {within `]-oo, b], continuous f} ->
      forall
    x
    Source code
    y
    Source code
    , x <= y -> y <= b -> f y <= f x.
    Proof.
    move=> df dfle0 cf x y xy yb.
    near (ninfty_nbhs R)%R => N.
    apply: (@ler0_derive1_le_cc _ _ N b) => [r|r| | | | // ]; rewrite ?in_itv/=.
    - by move=> /andP[Nr rb]; apply: df; rewrite !in_itv/= rb.
    - by move=> /andP[Nr rb]; apply: dfle0; rewrite !in_itv/= rb.
    - exact/continuous_subspaceW/cf/subset_itvr.
    - by rewrite yb andbT.
    by rewrite (le_trans xy)//= andbT.
    Unshelve. all: end_near. Qed.

    Lemma
    ger0_derive1_ndecr
    Source code
     (
    R
    Source code
     : realType) (
    f
    Source code
     : R -> R) (
    a
    Source code
    b
    Source code
     : R) :
      (forall
    x
    Source code
    , x \in `]a, b[%R -> derivable f x 1) ->
      (forall
    x
    Source code
    , x \in `]a, b[%R -> 0 <= f^`() x) ->
      {within `[a,b], continuous f} ->
      forall
    x
    Source code
    y
    Source code
    , a <= x -> x <= y -> y <= b -> f x <= f y.
    Proof.
    move=> df dfge0 cf x y ax xy yb.
    by apply: (@ger0_derive1_le_cc _ _ a b) => //;
      rewrite in_itv/= ?(le_trans _ xy)//= ?(le_trans xy) ?andbT.
    Qed.
    #[deprecated(since="mathcomp-analysis 1.9.0",
      note="renamed to `ger0_derive1_ndecr`")]
    Notation
    le0r_derive1_ndecr
    Source code
     := ger0_derive1_ndecr (only parsing).

    Lemma
    ger0_derive1_ndecry
    Source code
     {
    R
    Source code
     : realType} (
    f
    Source code
     : R -> R) (
    a
    Source code
     : R) :
      (forall
    x
    Source code
    , x \in `]a, +oo[%R -> derivable f x 1) ->
      (forall
    x
    Source code
    , x \in `]a, +oo[%R -> 0 <= f^`() x) ->
      {within `[a, +oo[, continuous f} ->
      forall
    x
    Source code
    y
    Source code
    , a <= x -> x <= y -> f x <= f y.
    Proof.
    move=> df dfge0 cf x y ax xy.
    near (pinfty_nbhs R)%R => N.
    apply: (@ger0_derive1_le_cc _ _ a N) => [r|r| | | | // ]; rewrite ?in_itv/=.
    - by move=> /andP[ar rN]; apply: df; rewrite !in_itv/= andbT ar.
    - by move=> /andP[ar rN]; apply: dfge0; rewrite !in_itv/= andbT ar.
    - exact/continuous_subspaceW/cf/subset_itvl.
    - by rewrite (le_trans ax)/=.
    - by rewrite (le_trans ax)/=.
    Unshelve. all: end_near. Qed.

    Lemma
    ger0_derive1_ndecrNy
    Source code
     {
    R
    Source code
     : realType} (
    f
    Source code
     : R -> R) (
    b
    Source code
     : R) :
      (forall
    x
    Source code
    , x \in `]-oo, b[%R -> derivable f x 1) ->
      (forall
    x
    Source code
    , x \in `]-oo, b[%R -> 0 <= f^`() x) ->
      {within `]-oo, b], continuous f} ->
      forall
    x
    Source code
    y
    Source code
    , x <= y -> y <= b -> f x <= f y.
    Proof.
    move=> df dfge0 cf x y xy yb.
    near (ninfty_nbhs R)%R => N.
    apply: (@ger0_derive1_le_cc _ _ N b) => [r|r| | | | // ]; rewrite ?in_itv/=.
    - by move=> /andP[Nr rb]; apply: df; rewrite !in_itv/=.
    - by move=> /andP[Nr rb]; apply: dfge0; rewrite !in_itv/=.
    - exact/continuous_subspaceW/cf/subset_itvr.
    - by rewrite (le_trans xy)//= andbT.
    - by rewrite yb andbT.
    Unshelve. all: end_near. Qed.

    Lemma
    decr_derive1_le0
    Source code
     {
    R
    Source code
     : realFieldType} (
    f
    Source code
     : R -> R) (
    D
    Source code
     : set R) (
    x
    Source code
     : R) :
      {in D° : set R, forall
    x
    Source code
    , derivable f x 1%R} ->
      {in D &, {homo f :
    x
    Source code
    y
    Source code
     /~ x < y}} ->
      D° x -> f^`() x <= 0.
    Proof.
    move=> df decrf Dx.
    apply: limr_le.
      under eq_fun; first (move=> h; rewrite -{2}(scaler1 h); over).
      by apply: df; rewrite inE.
    have [e /= e0 Hball] := open_subball (open_interior D) Dx.
    near=> h.
    have h0 : h != 0%R by near: h; exact: nbhs_dnbhs_neq.
    have Dhx : D° (h + x).
      apply: (Hball (`|2 * h|%R)) => //.
      - rewrite /= sub0r normrN normr_id normrM ger0_norm// -ltr_pdivlMl//.
          by near: h; apply: dnbhs0_lt; exact: mulr_gt0.
        by rewrite normrM ger0_norm// mulr_gt0// normr_gt0.
      apply: ball_sym; rewrite /ball/= addrK.
      by rewrite normrM (@ger0_norm _ 2)// ltr_pMl ?normr_gt0// ltr1n.
    move: h0; rewrite neq_lt => /orP[h0|h0].
    - rewrite nmulr_rle0 ?invr_lt0// subr_ge0 ltW//.
      by apply: decrf; rewrite ?in_itv ?andbT ?gtrDr// inE; exact: interior_subset.
    - rewrite pmulr_rle0 ?invr_gt0// subr_le0 ltW//.
      by apply: decrf; rewrite ?in_itv ?andbT ?ltrDr// inE; exact: interior_subset.
    Unshelve. end_near. Qed.

    Lemma
    decr_derive1_le0_itv
    Source code
     {
    R
    Source code
     : realType} (
    f
    Source code
     : R -> R)
        (
    b0
    Source code
    b1
    Source code
     : bool) (
    a
    Source code
    b
    Source code
     : R) (
    z
    Source code
     : R) :
      {in `]a, b[, forall
    x
    Source code
     : R, derivable f x 1%R} ->
      {in Interval (BSide b0 a) (BSide b1 b) &, {homo f :
    x
    Source code
    y
    Source code
     /~ (x < y)%R}} ->
      z \in `]a, b[%R -> f^`() z <= 0.
    Proof.
    have [?|ab] := leP b a; first by move=> _ _ /lt_in_itv; rewrite bnd_simp le_gtF.
    move=> df decrf zab.
    have {}zab : [set` (Interval (BSide b0 a) (BSide b1 b))]° z.
      by rewrite interior_itv// inE/=.
    apply: decr_derive1_le0 zab; first by rewrite interior_itv.
    by move=> x y /[!inE]/=; apply/decrf.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    decr_derive1_le0_itvy
    Source code
     {
    R
    Source code
     : realType} (
    f
    Source code
     : R -> R)
        (
    b0
    Source code
     : bool) (
    a
    Source code
     : R) (
    z
    Source code
     : R) :
      {in `]a, +oo[, forall
    x
    Source code
     : R, derivable f x 1%R} ->
      {in Interval (BSide b0 a) (BInfty _ false) &, {homo f :
    x
    Source code
    y
    Source code
     /~ (x < y)%R}} ->
      z \in `]a, +oo[%R -> f^`() z <= 0.
    Proof.
    move=> df decrf zay.
    have {}zay : [set` (Interval (BSide b0 a) (BInfty _ false))]° z.
      by rewrite interior_itv// inE/=.
    apply: decr_derive1_le0 zay; first by rewrite interior_itv.
    by move=> x y /[!inE]/=; apply/decrf.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    decr_derive1_le0_itvNy
    Source code
     {
    R
    Source code
     : realType} (
    f
    Source code
     : R -> R)
        (
    b1
    Source code
     : bool) (
    b
    Source code
     : R) (
    z
    Source code
     : R) :
      {in `]-oo, b[, forall
    x
    Source code
     : R, derivable f x 1%R} ->
      {in Interval (BInfty _ true) (BSide b1 b) &, {homo f :
    x
    Source code
    y
    Source code
     /~ (x < y)%R}} ->
      z \in `]-oo, b[%R -> f^`() z <= 0.
    Proof.
    move=> df decrf zNyb.
    have {}zNyb : [set` (Interval (BInfty _ true) (BSide b1 b))]° z.
      by rewrite interior_itv// inE/=.
    apply: decr_derive1_le0 zNyb; first by rewrite interior_itv.
    by move=> x y /[!inE]/=; apply/decrf.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    incr_derive1_ge0
    Source code
     {
    R
    Source code
     : realFieldType} (
    f
    Source code
     : R -> R)
       (
    D
    Source code
     : set R) (
    x
    Source code
     : R):
      {in D° : set R, forall
    x
    Source code
     : R, derivable f x 1%R} ->
      {in D &, {homo f :
    x
    Source code
    y
    Source code
     / (x < y)%R}} ->
      D° x -> 0 <= f^`() x.
    Proof.
    move=> df incrf Dx; rewrite -[leRHS]opprK oppr_ge0.
    have dfx : derivable f x 1 by apply: df; rewrite inE.
    rewrite derive1E -deriveN// -derive1E; apply: decr_derive1_le0 Dx.
    - by move=> y Dy; apply: derivableN; apply: df.
    - by move=> y z Dy Dz yz; rewrite ltrN2; apply: incrf.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    incr_derive1_ge0_itv
    Source code
     {
    R
    Source code
     : realType} (
    f
    Source code
     : R -> R)
      (
    b0
    Source code
    b1
    Source code
     : bool) (
    a
    Source code
    b
    Source code
     : R) (
    z
    Source code
     : R) :
      {in `]a, b[ : set R, forall
    x
    Source code
     : R, derivable f x 1%R} ->
      {in Interval (BSide b0 a) (BSide b1 b) &, {homo f :
    x
    Source code
    y
    Source code
     / (x < y)%R}} ->
      z \in `]a, b[%R -> 0 <= f^`() z.
    Proof.
    move=> df incrf zab; rewrite -[leRHS]opprK oppr_ge0.
    have dfz : derivable f z 1 by apply: df; rewrite inE.
    rewrite derive1E -deriveN// -derive1E.
    apply: (@decr_derive1_le0_itv _ _ b0 b1 a b); last exact: zab.
    - by move=> y Dy; apply: derivableN; apply: df.
    - move=> x y Dx Dy yx; rewrite ltrN2; apply: incrf => //; rewrite in_itv/=.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    incr_derive1_ge0_itvy
    Source code
     {
    R
    Source code
     : realType} (
    f
    Source code
     : R -> R)
        (
    b0
    Source code
     : bool) (
    a
    Source code
     : R) (
    z
    Source code
     : R) :
      {in `]a, +oo[, forall
    x
    Source code
     : R, derivable f x 1%R} ->
      {in Interval (BSide b0 a) +oo%O &, {homo f :
    x
    Source code
    y
    Source code
     / (x < y)%R}} ->
      z \in `]a, +oo[%R -> 0 <= f^`() z.
    Proof.
    move=> df incrf zay; rewrite -[leRHS]opprK oppr_ge0.
    have dfz : derivable f z 1 by apply: df; rewrite inE.
    rewrite derive1E -deriveN// -derive1E.
    apply: (@decr_derive1_le0_itvy _ _ b0 _ _ _ _ zay).
    - by move=> y Dy; apply: derivableN; apply: df.
    - by move=> x y Dx Dy yx; rewrite ltrN2; apply: incrf.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    incr_derive1_ge0_itvNy
    Source code
     {
    R
    Source code
     : realType} (
    f
    Source code
     : R -> R)
        (
    b1
    Source code
     : bool) (
    b
    Source code
     : R) (
    z
    Source code
     : R) :
      {in `]-oo, b[, forall
    x
    Source code
     : R, derivable f x 1%R} ->
      {in Interval (BInfty _ true) (BSide b1 b) &, {homo f :
    x
    Source code
    y
    Source code
     / (x < y)%R}} ->
      z \in `]-oo, b[%R -> 0 <= f^`() z.
    Proof.
    move=> df incrf zNyb; rewrite -[leRHS]opprK oppr_ge0.
    have dfz : derivable f z 1 by apply: df; rewrite inE.
    rewrite derive1E -deriveN// -derive1E.
    apply: (@decr_derive1_le0_itvNy _ _ b1 _ _ _ _ zNyb).
    - by move=> y Dy; apply: derivableN; apply: df.
    - by move=> x y Dx Dy yx; rewrite ltrN2; apply: incrf.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    derive1_comp
    Source code
     (
    R
    Source code
     : realFieldType) (
    f
    Source code
    g
    Source code
     : R -> R)
    x
    Source code
     :
      derivable f x 1 -> derivable g (f x) 1 ->
      (g \o f)^`() x = g^`()%classic (f x) * f^`()%classic x.
    Proof.
    move=> /derivable1_diffP df /derivable1_diffP dg.
    rewrite derive1E'; first exact/differentiable_comp.
    rewrite diff_comp // !derive1E' //= -[X in 'd _ _ X = _]mulr1.
    by rewrite [LHS]linearZ mulrC.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    near_eq_growth_rate
    Source code
     (
    R
    Source code
     : numFieldType) (
    V
    Source code
    W
    Source code
     : normedModType R)
        (
    f
    Source code
    g
    Source code
     : V -> W) (
    a
    Source code
    v
    Source code
     : V) : {near a, f =1 g} ->
       \forall
    h
    Source code
     \near 0,
         h^-1 *: (f (h *: v + a) - f a) = h^-1 *: (g (h *: v + a) - g a).
    Proof.
    move=> fg; near do rewrite (nbhs_singleton fg) (near fg)// addrC.
    apply/(@near0Z _ _ _ [set
    v
    Source code
     | (a + v) \is_near (nbhs a)])=> /=.
    by rewrite (near_shift a)/=; near do rewrite /= sub0r addrC addrNK//.
    Unshelve. all: by end_near. Qed.

    Lemma
    near_eq_derivable
    Source code
     (
    R
    Source code
     : numFieldType) (
    V
    Source code
    W
    Source code
     : normedModType R)
        (
    f
    Source code
    g
    Source code
     : V -> W) (
    a
    Source code
    v
    Source code
     : V) :
      {near a, f =1 g} -> derivable f a v -> derivable g a v.
    Proof.
    have [-> _ _|] := eqVneq v 0; first exact/derivable0.
    move=> vn0 nfg /cvg_ex[/= l fl]; apply/cvg_ex; exists l => /=.
    exact/(cvg_trans _ fl)/near_eq_cvg/cvg_within/near_eq_growth_rate.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    near_eq_derive
    Source code
     (
    R
    Source code
     : numFieldType) (
    V
    Source code
    W
    Source code
     : normedModType R)
      (
    f
    Source code
    g
    Source code
     : V -> W) (
    a
    Source code
    v
    Source code
     : V) :
      (\near
    a
    Source code
    , f a = g a) -> 'D_v f a = 'D_v g a.
    Proof.
    have [-> _|] := eqVneq v 0; first by rewrite !derive0.
    move=> v0 fg; rewrite /derive; congr (lim _).
    rewrite eqEsubset; split; apply/near_eq_cvg/cvg_within/near_eq_growth_rate =>//.
    by near do apply/esym.
    Unshelve. all: by end_near. Qed.

    Lemma
    near_eq_is_derive
    Source code
     (
    R
    Source code
     : numFieldType) (
    V
    Source code
    W
    Source code
     : normedModType R)
        (
    f
    Source code
    g
    Source code
     : V -> W) (
    a
    Source code
    v
    Source code
     : V) (
    df
    Source code
     : W) :
      (\near
    a
    Source code
    , f a = g a) -> is_derive a v f df -> is_derive a v g df.
    Proof.
    move=> fg [fav <-]; rewrite (near_eq_derive _ fg).
    by apply: DeriveDef => //; exact: near_eq_derivable fav.
    Qed.

    Section Derive_max.
    Context {
    K
    Source code
     : realType} {
    V
    Source code
    W
    Source code
     : normedModType K}.
    Implicit Types f g : V -> K^o.
    Implicit Type x : V.

    Fact
    der_max_subproof
    Source code
    f
    Source code
    g
    Source code
    x
    Source code
    v
    Source code
     : f x != g x ->
      derivable f x v -> derivable g x v ->
      {for x, continuous f} -> {for x, continuous g} ->
      (fun
    h
    Source code
     => h^-1 *: (((f \max g) \o shift x) (h *: v) - (f \max g) x))
        @ 0^' --> if f x < g x then 'D_v g x else 'D_v f x.
    Proof.
    wlog: f g x / f x < g x.
      move=> wlg; rewrite neq_lt => /orP[fg|gf df dg fxv gxv].
      - by apply: wlg => //; rewrite lt_eqF.
      - rewrite fun_maxC ltNge if_neg le_eqVlt eq_sym gt_eqF//=.
        by apply: wlg => //; rewrite lt_eqF.
    move=> fx_lt_gx fg_neq df dg cf cg; case: ifPn => fg /=.
    - rewrite /Num.max fg => A DgxA.
      apply: (@near_eq_cvg _ _ _ _ (fun
    h
    Source code
     => h^-1 *: (g (h *: v + x) - g x))).
      + near do rewrite ifT// -subr_lt0 -[ltLHS]/(((f - g) \o shift x) (_ *: v)).
        have Hf (
    h
    Source code
     : V -> K^o) : continuous_at x h ->
            h (shift x (k *: v)) @[
    k
    Source code
     --> nbhs 0^'] --> h x.
          move=> ch.
          apply: cvg_comp; last exact: ch.
          rewrite -[in nbhs x](add0r x).
          apply: cvgD; last exact: cvg_cst.
          rewrite -(scale0r v); apply: cvgZ; last exact: cvg_cst.
          exact: nbhs_dnbhs.
        apply/(cvgr_lt (f x - g x)); last by rewrite subr_lt0.
        by apply: cvgB; exact: Hf.
      + exact: dg.
    - absurd.
      by rewrite fx_lt_gx in fg.
    Unshelve. all: by end_near. Qed.

    Lemma
    derivable_max
    Source code
    f
    Source code
    g
    Source code
    x
    Source code
    v
    Source code
     :
      f x != g x -> derivable f x v -> derivable g x v ->
      {for x, continuous f} -> {for x, continuous g} ->
      derivable (f \max g) x v.
    Proof.
    move=> fx_gx df dg cf cg; apply/cvg_ex => /=.
    exists (if f x < g x then 'D_v g x else 'D_v f x).
    exact: der_max_subproof.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    derive_maxl
    Source code
    f
    Source code
    g
    Source code
    x
    Source code
    v
    Source code
     : f x > g x ->
      {for x, continuous f} -> {for x, continuous g} ->
      'D_v (f \max g) x = 'D_v f x.
    Proof.
    have [-> gx_fx cf cg|v0 fg cf cg]:= eqVneq v 0.
      by rewrite !derive0.
    apply: near_eq_derive => //.
    near do rewrite /Order.max_fun /Num.max ifN// -leNgt -subr_le0.
    by move: fg; rewrite -subr_lt0; apply: cvgr_le; exact: cvgB.
    Unshelve. all: by end_near. Qed.

    Lemma
    derive_maxr
    Source code
    f
    Source code
    g
    Source code
    x
    Source code
    v
    Source code
     : f x < g x ->
      {for x, continuous f} -> {for x, continuous g} ->
      'D_v (f \max g) x = 'D_v g x.
    Proof.
    by move=> fg cf cg; rewrite fun_maxC derive_maxl. Qed.

    Lemma
    derivable_min
    Source code
    f
    Source code
    g
    Source code
    x
    Source code
    v
    Source code
     :
      f x != g x -> derivable f x v -> derivable g x v ->
      {for x, continuous f} -> {for x, continuous g} ->
      derivable (f \min g) x v.
    Proof.
    have [-> *|x0] := eqVneq v 0; first exact/derivable0.
    rewrite min_fun_to_max => fx_gx df dg cf cg.
    by apply/derivableB; [apply/(derivableD df dg) |apply/derivable_max].
    Qed.

    Lemma
    derive_minr
    Source code
    f
    Source code
    g
    Source code
    x
    Source code
    v
    Source code
     : f x > g x ->
      {for x, continuous f} -> {for x, continuous g} ->
      'D_v (f \min g) x = 'D_v g x.
    Proof.
    have [-> *|v0 fg cf cg] := eqVneq v 0; first by rewrite !derive0.
    apply: near_eq_derive => //.
    near do rewrite /Order.min_fun /Num.min ifN// -leNgt -subr_le0.
    by move: fg; rewrite -subr_lt0; apply: cvgr_le; exact: cvgB.
    Unshelve. all: by end_near. Qed.

    Lemma
    derive_minl
    Source code
    f
    Source code
    g
    Source code
    x
    Source code
    v
    Source code
     : f x < g x ->
      {for x, continuous f} -> {for x, continuous g} ->
      'D_v (f \min g) x = 'D_v f x.
    Proof.
    by move=> fg cf cg; rewrite fun_minC derive_minr. Qed.

    End Derive_max.

    Lemma
    derive1N
    Source code
     {
    R
    Source code
     : realFieldType} (
    f
    Source code
     : R -> R) (
    x
    Source code
     : R) :
      derivable f x 1 -> (- f)^`() x = (- f^`()%classic x).
    Proof.
    by move=> fx; rewrite !derive1E deriveN. Qed.

    Lemma
    derivable_opp
    Source code
     {
    R
    Source code
     : realFieldType} (
    x
    Source code
     : R)
    v
    Source code
     : derivable -%R x v.
    Proof.
    by apply: derivableN; exact: derivable_id. Qed.

    Lemma
    derive1_id
    Source code
     {
    R
    Source code
     : realFieldType} (
    x
    Source code
     : R) : id^`() x = 1.
    Proof.
    by rewrite derive1E derive_id. Qed.

    Lemma
    trigger_derive
    Source code
     (
    R
    Source code
     : realType) (
    f
    Source code
     : R -> R)
    x
    Source code
    x1
    Source code
    y1
    Source code
     :
      is_derive x (1 : R) f x1 -> x1 = y1 -> is_derive x 1 f y1.
    Proof.
    by move=> Hi <-. Qed.

    Section derive_horner.
    Variable (
    R
    Source code
     : realFieldType).
    Local Open Scope ring_scope.

    Lemma
    horner0_ext
    Source code
     : horner (0 : {poly R}) = 0.
    Proof.
    by apply/funext => y /=; rewrite horner0. Qed.

    Lemma
    hornerD_ext
    Source code
     (
    p
    Source code
     : {poly R})
    r
    Source code
     :
      horner (p * 'X + r%:P) = horner (p * 'X) + horner (r%:P).
    Proof.
    by apply/funext => y /=; rewrite !(hornerE,fctE). Qed.

    Lemma
    horner_scale_ext
    Source code
     (
    p
    Source code
     : {poly R}) :
      horner (p * 'X) = (fun
    x
    Source code
     => p.[x] * x)%R.
    Proof.
    by apply/funext => y; rewrite !hornerE. Qed.

    Lemma
    hornerC_ext
    Source code
     (
    r
    Source code
     : R) : horner r%:P = cst r.
    Proof.
    by apply/funext => y /=; rewrite !hornerE. Qed.

    Lemma
    derivable_horner
    Source code
     (
    p
    Source code
     : {poly R})
    x
    Source code
     : derivable (horner p) x 1.
    Proof.
    elim/poly_ind: p => [|p r ih]; first by rewrite horner0_ext.
    rewrite hornerD_ext; apply: derivableD.
    - rewrite horner_scale_ext/=.
      by apply: derivableM; [exact:ih|exact:derivable_id].
    - by rewrite hornerC_ext; exact: derivable_cst.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    derivE
    Source code
     (
    p
    Source code
     : {poly R}) : horner (p^`()) = (horner p)^`()%classic.
    Proof.
    apply/funext => x; elim/poly_ind: p => [|p r ih].
      by rewrite deriv0 hornerC horner0_ext derive1_cst.
    rewrite derivD hornerD hornerD_ext.
    rewrite derive1E deriveD//; [exact: derivable_horner..|].
    rewrite -!derive1E hornerC_ext derive1_cst addr0.
    rewrite horner_scale_ext derive1E deriveM//; first exact: derivable_horner.
    rewrite derive_id -derive1E -ih derivC horner0 addr0 derivM hornerD !hornerE.
    by rewrite derivX hornerE mulr1 addrC mulrC scaler1.
    Qed.

    Global Instance
    is_derive_poly
    Source code
     (
    p
    Source code
     : {poly R}) (
    x
    Source code
     : R) :
      is_derive x (1:R) (horner p) p^`().[x].
    Proof.
    by apply: DeriveDef; [exact: derivable_horner|rewrite derivE derive1E].
    Qed.

    Lemma
    continuous_horner
    Source code
     (
    p
    Source code
     : {poly R}) : continuous (horner p).
    Proof.
    move=> /= x; apply/differentiable_continuous.
    exact/derivable1_diffP/derivable_horner.
    Qed.

    End derive_horner.

    Section pointwise_derivable.
    Context {
    R
    Source code
     : realFieldType} {
    V
    Source code
     : normedModType R} {
    m
    Source code
    n
    Source code
     : nat}.
    Implicit Types M : V -> 'M[R]_(m, n).

    Lemma
    derivable_mxP
    Source code
    M
    Source code
    t
    Source code
    v
    Source code
     :
      derivable M t v <-> forall
    i
    Source code
    j
    Source code
    , derivable (fun
    x
    Source code
     => M x i j) t v.
    Proof.
    split=> [|Mvt].
    - move=> /cvg_ex[/= l Mvtl] i j; apply/cvg_ex; exists (l i j).
      apply/cvgrPdist_le => /= e e0.
      move/cvgrPdist_le : Mvtl => /(_ _ e0)[/= r r0] rMvte.
      near=> x.
      apply: le_trans (rMvte x _ _).
      + rewrite [leRHS]/Num.Def.normr/= mx_normrE.
        apply: le_trans; last exact: le_bigmax.
        by rewrite !mxE.
      + rewrite /ball_/= sub0r normrN.
        by near: x; exact: dnbhs0_lt.
      + near: x; exact: nbhs_dnbhs_neq.
    - apply/cvg_ex => /=.
      exists (\matrix_(
    i
    Source code
     < m,
    j
    Source code
     < n) sval (cid ((cvg_ex _).1 (Mvt i j)))).
      apply/cvgrPdist_le => /= e e0.
      near=> x.
      rewrite /Num.Def.normr/= mx_normrE (bigmax_le _ (ltW e0))//= => i _.
      rewrite !mxE/=.
      move: i; near: x; apply: filter_forall => /= i.
      exact: ((cvgrPdist_le _ _).1 (svalP (cid ((cvg_ex _).1 (Mvt i.1 i.2))))).
    Unshelve. all: by end_near. Qed.

    End pointwise_derivable.

    Section pointwise_derive.
    Local Open Scope classical_set_scope.
    Context {
    R
    Source code
     : realFieldType} {
    V
    Source code
     : normedModType R}.

    Lemma
    derive_mx
    Source code
     {
    m
    Source code
    n
    Source code
     : nat} (
    M
    Source code
     : V -> 'M[R]_(m, n))
    t
    Source code
    v
    Source code
     :
      derivable M t v ->
      'D_v M t = \matrix_(
    i
    Source code
     < m,
    j
    Source code
     < n) 'D_v (fun
    t
    Source code
     => M t i j) t.
    Proof.
    move=> /cvg_ex[/= l Mvtl]; apply/cvg_lim => //=; apply/cvgrPdist_le => /= e e0.
    move/cvgrPdist_le : (Mvtl) => /(_ (e / 2)) /[!divr_gt0]// /(_ isT)[d /= d0 dle].
    near=> x.
    rewrite [leLHS]/Num.Def.normr/= mx_normrE (bigmax_le _ (ltW e0))//= => -[i j] _.
    rewrite [in leLHS]mxE/= [X in _ + X]mxE -(subrKA (l i j)).
    rewrite (le_trans (ler_normD _ _))// (splitr e) lerD//.
    - rewrite mxE.
      suff : (h^-1 *: (M (h *: v + t) i j - M t i j)) @[
    h
    Source code
     --> 0^'] --> l i j.
        move/cvg_lim => /=; rewrite /derive /= => ->//.
        by rewrite subrr normr0 divr_ge0// ltW.
      apply/cvgrPdist_le => /= r r0.
      move/cvgrPdist_le : Mvtl => /(_ r r0)[/= s s0] sr.
      near=> y.
      apply: (@le_trans _ _ (`|l - y^-1 *: (M (y *: v + t) - M t)|)).
        rewrite [in leRHS]/Num.Def.normr/= mx_normrE.
        by under eq_bigr do rewrite !mxE; exact: (le_bigmax _ _ (i, j)).
      rewrite sr//=; last by near: y; exact: nbhs_dnbhs_neq.
      by rewrite sub0r normrN; near: y; exact: dnbhs0_lt.
    - rewrite mxE.
      apply: (@le_trans _ _ `|l - x^-1 *: (M (x *: v + t) - M t)|).
        rewrite [in leRHS]/Num.Def.normr/= mx_normrE/=.
        under eq_bigr do rewrite !mxE.
        apply: le_trans; last exact: le_bigmax.
        by rewrite !mxE.
      apply: dle => //=; last by near: x; exact: nbhs_dnbhs_neq.
      by rewrite sub0r normrN; near: x; exact: dnbhs0_lt.
    Unshelve. all: by end_near. Qed.

    Global Instance
    is_derive_mx
    Source code
     {
    m
    Source code
    n
    Source code
     : nat} (
    M
    Source code
     : V -> 'M[R]_(m, n))
        (
    dM
    Source code
     : 'M[R]_(m, n)) (
    x
    Source code
    v
    Source code
     : V) :
      (forall
    i
    Source code
    j
    Source code
    , is_derive x v (fun
    t
    Source code
     => M t i j) (dM i j)) ->
      is_derive x v M dM.
    Proof.
    move=> MdM; apply: DeriveDef; first exact/derivable_mxP.
    apply/matrixP => i j.
    have [_ <-] := MdM i j.
    rewrite derive_mx ?mxE//.
    apply/derivable_mxP => i0 j0.
    by have [] := MdM i0 j0.
    Qed.

    Fact
    dmx
    Source code
     {
    m
    Source code
    n
    Source code
     : nat} (
    M
    Source code
     : V -> 'M[R]_(m, n)) (
    x
    Source code
     : V) :
      let
    g
    Source code
     := fun
    t
    Source code
     : V => (\matrix_(
    i
    Source code
     < m,
    j
    Source code
     < n) 'd M x t i j) in
      differentiable M x ->
      continuous g /\
      M \o shift x = cst (M x) + g +o_ 0 id.
    Proof.
    move=> dM Mx; split => [|].
    - apply/continuous_mx => i j v; apply/cvgrPdist_le => /= e e0.
      case: Mx => -[+ _] => /(_ v)/cvgrPdist_le/(_ _ e0).
      apply: filterS => /= t; apply: le_trans.
      by rewrite {2}/Num.norm/= mx_normrE (le_trans _ (le_bigmax _ _ (i, j))) ?mxE.
    - apply/eqaddoE; rewrite funeqE => y /=.
      rewrite (diff_locallyx Mx) /dM !fctE; congr (_ + _ + _).
      by apply/matrixP => i j/=; rewrite mxE.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    diffmx
    Source code
     {
    m
    Source code
    n
    Source code
     : nat} (
    M
    Source code
     : V -> 'M[R]_(m, n))
    x
    Source code
     :
      differentiable M x ->
      'd M (nbhs_filter_on x) =
      (fun
    t
    Source code
     : V => \matrix_(
    i
    Source code
     < m,
    j
    Source code
     < n) 'd M x t i j) :> (_ -> _).
    Proof.
    move=> dM.
    set g := fun
    t
    Source code
     : V => \matrix_(
    i
    Source code
    ,
    j
    Source code
    ) 'd M x t i j.
    have glin : linear (g : V -> _).
      move=> a u w.
      by rewrite /g linearD linearZ/=; apply/matrixP => i j; rewrite !mxE.
    pose glM := GRing.isLinear.Build _ _ _ _ _ glin.
    pose gL : {linear _ -> _} := HB.pack g glM.
    by apply: (@diff_unique _ _ _ _ gL); have [? ?] := dmx dM.
    Qed.

    End pointwise_derive.

    Section Ris_diff_mx.
    Local Open Scope classical_set_scope.
    Context {
    R
    Source code
     : realFieldType}.

    Global Instance
    is_diff_mx
    Source code
     {
    m
    Source code
    n
    Source code
     : nat} (
    M
    Source code
    dM
    Source code
     : R -> 'M[R]_(m, n)) (
    x
    Source code
     : R) :
      (forall
    i
    Source code
    j
    Source code
    , is_diff x (fun t => M t i j) (fun
    t
    Source code
     => dM t i j)) ->
      is_diff x M dM.
    Proof.
    move=> /= MdM.
    have diffMx : differentiable M (nbhs_filter_on x).
      apply/derivable1_diffP; apply/derivable_mxP => i j.
      by have [/(@derivable1_diffP _ _ (fun
    t
    Source code
     => M t i j) x)] := MdM i j.
    apply: DiffDef; first exact: diffMx.
    rewrite diffmx//=; apply/funext => /= v; apply/matrixP => i j.
    rewrite !mxE.
    have [diffMij dMdM] := MdM i j.
    rewrite -deriveE//.
    move/(congr1 (fun
    f
    Source code
     => f v)) : dMdM.
    rewrite -(deriveE _ diffMij) => <-.
    rewrite derive_mx ?mxE//=.
    apply/derivable_mxP => i0 j0/=.
    by have [/diff_derivable-/(_ v)] := MdM i0 j0.
    Qed.

    End Ris_diff_mx.

    Section derivable_derive_row_mx.
    Context {
    R
    Source code
     : realFieldType} {
    V
    Source code
     : normedModType R} {
    n1
    Source code
    n2
    Source code
     : nat}.
    Implicit Types (f : V -> 'rV[R]_n1) (g : V -> 'rV[R]_n2).

    Lemma
    derivable_row_mx
    Source code
    f
    Source code
    g
    Source code
    t
    Source code
    v
    Source code
     : derivable f t v -> derivable g t v ->
      derivable (fun
    x
    Source code
     => row_mx (f x) (g x)) t v.
    Proof.
    move=> /= fv gv; apply/derivable_mxP => i j; rewrite (ord1 i)/=.
    have /cvg_ex[/= l Hl] := fv.
    have /cvg_ex[/= k Hk] := gv.
    apply/cvg_ex => /=; exists (row_mx l k ord0 j).
    apply/cvgrPdist_le => /= e e0.
    move/cvgrPdist_le : Hl => /(_ _ e0) Hl.
    move/cvgrPdist_le : Hk => /(_ _ e0) Hk.
    move: Hl Hk; apply: filterS2 => x Hl Hk.
    rewrite !mxE; case: fintype.splitP => j1 jj1.
    - rewrite (le_trans _ Hl)// [in leRHS]/Num.Def.normr/= mx_normrE.
      by rewrite (le_trans _ (le_bigmax _ _ (ord0, j1)))// !mxE.
    - rewrite (le_trans _ Hk)// [in leRHS]/Num.Def.normr/= mx_normrE.
      by rewrite (le_trans _ (le_bigmax _ _ (ord0, j1)))// !mxE.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    derive_row_mx
    Source code
    f
    Source code
    g
    Source code
    t
    Source code
    v
    Source code
     : derivable f t v -> derivable g t v ->
      'D_v (fun
    x
    Source code
     => row_mx (f x) (g x)) t = row_mx ('D_v f t) ('D_v g t).
    Proof.
    move=> fv gv; rewrite derive_mx.
      by apply: derivable_row_mx; [exact: fv|exact: gv].
    apply/matrixP => i j.
    rewrite !mxE !derive_mx//; case: splitP => k jE; rewrite !mxE; congr ('D_v _ t);
      apply/funext => w; rewrite !mxE; case: splitP => l lE//.
    - by congr (f w i _); apply/val_inj => /=; rewrite -jE -lE.
    - by absurd: lE; rewrite ltn_eqF//= jE (leq_trans (ltn_ord k))// leq_addr.
    - by absurd: lE; rewrite gtn_eqF//= jE (leq_trans (ltn_ord l))// leq_addr.
    - congr (g w i _); apply/val_inj => /=.
      by apply/eqP; rewrite -(eqn_add2l n1) -lE -jE.
    Qed.

    Global Instance
    is_derive_row_mx
    Source code
    f
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    g
    Source code
    B
    Source code
    x
    Source code
    v
    Source code
     :
      is_derive x v f A -> is_derive x v g B ->
      is_derive x v (fun
    t
    Source code
     => row_mx (f t) (g t)) (row_mx A B).
    Proof.
    move=> [dfx fA] [dgx gB]; apply: DeriveDef; first exact: derivable_row_mx.
    by rewrite derive_row_mx// fA gB.
    Qed.

    End derivable_derive_row_mx.

    Lemma
    eqo_row_mx
    Source code
     (
    K
    Source code
     : realFieldType) {
    m
    Source code
    n1
    Source code
    n2
    Source code
     : nat} (
    F
    Source code
     : filter_on K)
      (
    A1
    Source code
     : K -> 'M[K]_(m, n1)) (
    A2
    Source code
     : K -> 'M[K]_(m, n2)) (
    f
    Source code
     : K -> K) :
      (fun
    t
    Source code
     => row_mx ([o_F f of A1] t) ([o_F f of A2] t)) =o_F f.
    Proof.
    apply/eqoP => _/posnumP[e]; near=> x; rewrite norm_row_mx ge_max.
    by apply/andP; split; near: x; apply: littleoP.
    Unshelve. all: by end_near. Qed.

    Section is_diff_row_mx.
    Local Open Scope classical_set_scope.
    Context {
    R
    Source code
     : realFieldType} {
    n1
    Source code
    n2
    Source code
     : nat}.
    Implicit Types (M dM : R -> 'rV[R]_n1) (N dN : R -> 'rV[R]_n2) (x t : R).

    Fact
    drow_mx
    Source code
    M
    Source code
    N
    Source code
    x
    Source code
     (
    f
    Source code
     : R -> R) : differentiable M x -> differentiable N x ->
      continuous (fun
    y
    Source code
     => row_mx ('d M x y) ('d N x y)) /\
      (fun
    y
    Source code
     => row_mx (M y) (N y)) \o shift x = cst (row_mx (M x) (N x)) +
      (fun
    y
    Source code
     => row_mx ('d M x y) ('d N x y)) +o_ 0 id.
    Proof.
    move=> df dg; split=> [/= ?|].
      by apply: cvg_row_mx => //=; exact: diff_continuous.
    apply/eqaddoE; rewrite funeqE => y /=.
    rewrite ![_ (_ + x)]diff_locallyx//.
    have ->/= : forall
    h
    Source code
    e
    Source code
    , row_mx (M x + 'd M x y + [o_ 0 id of h] y)
      (N x + 'd N x y + [o_ 0 id of e] y) =
      row_mx (M x) (N x) + row_mx ('d M x y) ('d N x y) +
      row_mx ([o_ 0 id of h] y) ([o_ 0 id of e] y).
      by move=> /= h e; rewrite !add_row_mx.
    congr (_ + _).
    by rewrite -[LHS]/((fun
    y
    Source code
     => row_mx (_ y) (_ y)) y) eqo_row_mx.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    diff_row_mx
    Source code
    M
    Source code
    N
    Source code
    x
    Source code
     : differentiable M x -> differentiable N x ->
      'd (fun
    y
    Source code
     => row_mx (M y) (N y)) x =
      (fun
    y
    Source code
     => row_mx ('d M x y) ('d N x y)) :> (R -> 'rV[R]_(n1 + n2)).
    Proof.
    move=> df dg.
    pose d
    y
    Source code
     := row_mx ('d M x y) ('d N x y).
    have lin_row_mx : linear d.
      by move=> /= a b c; rewrite /d 2!linearPZ scale_row_mx add_row_mx.
    pose row_mxlM := GRing.isLinear.Build _ _ _ _ _ lin_row_mx.
    pose row_mxL : {linear _ -> _} := HB.pack d row_mxlM.
    rewrite -/d -[d]/(row_mxL : _ -> _).
    by apply: diff_unique; have [] := drow_mx id df dg.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    differentiable_row_mx
    Source code
    M
    Source code
    N
    Source code
    x
    Source code
     : differentiable M x -> differentiable N x ->
      differentiable (fun
    t
    Source code
     => row_mx (M t) (N t)) x.
    Proof.
    by move=> df dg; apply/diff_locallyP; rewrite diff_row_mx //; apply: drow_mx.
    Qed.

    Global Instance
    is_diff_row_mx
    Source code
    M
    Source code
    dM
    Source code
    N
    Source code
    dN
    Source code
    x
    Source code
     :
      is_diff x M dM -> is_diff x N dN ->
      is_diff x (fun t => row_mx (M t) (N t)) (fun
    t
    Source code
     => row_mx (dM t) (dN t)).
    Proof.
    move=> dfx dgx; apply: DiffDef; first exact: differentiable_row_mx.
    by rewrite diff_row_mx// !diff_val.
    Qed.

    End is_diff_row_mx.
    Generated by rocqnavi
